name: [petition enclosed] via Voter Protection Project
subject: Trump would HATE if you added your name!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | **Peter (SIGNATURE MISSING):[Sign your name to PASS Universal Vote By Mail ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04e0/72412298/4fc4d043/6104fa6f/1975986909/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Sign+your+name+to+PASS+Universal+Vote+By&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")**
* * *
Barack Obama JUST announced -- he wants EVERYONE to Vote By Mail: | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04e0/72412298/4fc4d043/6104fa6e/1975986909/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")
---
YES YES YES!
_But now Donald Trump wants to SHUT DOWN our Vote By Mail Movement!_
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04e0/72412298/4fc4d043/6104fa51/1975986909/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")
---
**Peter -- if we want to PASS Universal Vote By Mail, we need every Good Democrat to get up off the sidelines.**

SIGNATURE GOAL: **10,000**

PETITION STATUS for dpwillis67@gmail.com: YOU HAVE NOT SIGNED!
| | | [SIGN YOUR NAME IF YOU SUPPORT UNIVERSAL VOTE BY MAIL ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04e0/72412298/4fc4d043/6104fa50/1975986909/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+YOUR+NAME+IF+YOU+SUPPORT+UNIVERSAL+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")
---
Thanks for standing with us,
_\-- the Voter Protection Project_

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04e0/72412298/4fc4d043/6104fa53/1975986909/VEsD/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3&source=VPP_EM_EN_200423_ObamaVBM_U2_X3")

subject: Get your Dr. Chuck yard sign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Send me your info & we’ll get one delivered to you. Tap or click >>
Fellow Hoosier, We’re not letting up for a minute in this all-important primary race, and we need everyone’s help to promote Dr. Chuck’s candidacy. I’ve got a big stack of yard signs on hand... and I’d love to get one out to you! [ ](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com) Putting up a yard sign is a great way to show where you stand in this race and get your neighbors interested in learning more about Dr. Chuck. Interested in having us deliver and install a yard sign? Just drop me a quick note at [mark@drchuckforcongress.com](mailto:mark@drchuckforcongress.com). Please be sure to include your name, address, and phone number. name: We're STUNNED >>>>> from UNITEDemocrats
subject: Trump just suggested INJECTING household disinfectants into the human body
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Absolutely horrifying.

| Peter -- We're honestly blown away by how dumb Trump is.

[**Donald Trump just suggested that doctors look into INJECTING people with household disinfectants to cure the virus.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17248858/187946764/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200424_EMDF_E1_Trump-Bleach_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiNWYzNjczLTM5ODYtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qtDs56P4_oLt55fzLvLeo5hsJbeu3em_gwBr1owhUJ0=) | ["The disinfectant knocks it out in a minute. One minute. Is there a way we can do something like that by injection inside? **It's almost a cleaning. It gets in the lungs and does a tremendous number on the lungs.** "
\- President Trump](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17248859/187946765/-1924412461?refcode=VC_UD_20200424_EMDF_E1_Trump-Bleach_T0-S0SL0C0_AC&amount=10&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiNWYzNjczLTM5ODYtZWExMS1hOTRjLTAwMTU1ZDAzYjFlOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qtDs56P4_oLt55fzLvLeo5hsJbeu3em_gwBr1owhUJ0=)
---
This might be his most dangerous and downright stupid ideas ever. Trump's medical "advice" could kill people, Peter.

But he doesn't care -- he's still trying to re-open states against the advice of experts, all so he can see a boost in his poll numbers and his ego.

[**Donald Trump is dangerous. Our organization is going to PROVE to swing-voters what an absolute failure Trump has been as president. We've set a Rapid Response goal of $5,000 to help us reach more voters as soon as possible. name: Team Hagerty
subject: Join #TeamHagerty for Movie Night
body:
Peter,During this time of physical distancing, we want to stay socially connected. What better way to do that than to watch a movie together and order pizza from your favorite local pizza place!Team Hagerty invites you to join our second movie night to watch _The Pursuit of Happyness_. This event will be from the comfort of your home, but we encourage everyone to share pictures and stay connected with us through social media. Check out our **[Facebook page](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-r/)** for all of the details.[**Join Team Hagerty**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-j/)** [RSVP FOR MOVIE NIGHT](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-t/) Hope you can join us!Best,
Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pllduul-fuutjhhtj-o/)

name: Team Eugene
subject: Eugene's leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Our race is more than one of the best opportunities in the country to protect and expand the Democratic House majority, it’s a chance to elect a proven, dedicated leader like Eugene to Congress to fight for the issues that impact all of us.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17249961/187966050/460726911?amount=25&refcode=em_fr_2020.04.24_b1_te_all-nd&refcode2=7d4fd2e7-4086-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDRmZDJlNy00MDg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PYFHCGK9iHTm3-i9x-r3-UZ1I8y_LqiW5avuXlMQUwQ=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team,

When the _Washington Post, National Journal,_ and _Cook Political Report_ all called PA-10 one of the top races to watch in 2020, we knew that we would need a strong grassroots team to help us flip this seat blue. And when the DCCC added Eugene to its highly competitive Red to Blue program, we knew that this would be one of the most competitive races in the entire country.

**But our race is more than one of the _best opportunities in the country_ to protect and expand the Democratic House majority, it’s a chance to elect a proven, dedicated leader like Eugene to Congress to fight for the issues that impact all of us. **

name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: Protecting big cats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
**If there was one takeaway from Netflix 's _Tiger King_ , it's that big cats should _not_ be kept as pets or bred for profit. **
Right now, every state has its own laws surrounding the ownership of exotic animals. What we need is a federal law prohibiting the private ownership of lions, tigers, cheetahs, bobcats, cougars, and leopards nationwide.
**That 's why Linda is demanding Congress take action to ban the private ownership of big cats in all 50 states. [Will you stand with her by signing on?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/IjJ9oIt7AOMYfEcRvEZsH3FMATBbzWFRQWw4M9LppJ8=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/PaLwbdhrMkrRyH6aY1q8PU_PkwCJFhNwgYQel5EB0XY=)
It's simple: the private ownership big cats is exploitative, cruel, and dangerous.
Big cats should not be props for photos shoots or pawns for personal collection. They're _wild_ animals that deserve our respect and protection under the law.
**[Defend big cats in captivity | SIGN YOUR NAME>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/IjJ9oIt7AOMYfEcRvEZsH3FMATBbzWFRQWw4M9LppJ8=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/PaLwbdhrMkrRyH6aY1q8PU_PkwCJFhNwgYQel5EB0XY=)
Thank you for taking action,
\--_Team S anchez_
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/yXNoeZhnuzDdRDNxtSowEblhnRWpr3EYvZW-reSDYSY=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5i1Isz14b4h_PLogemmrSa79TdRQWOW67f19z6_UhLo=/-T6ZxN-ukS_VZbk8KIWpjlw_Cjx3ltiF1zmUwtiO7vo=)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: we can’t ignore gun violence right now, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
This week my team and I did a virtual town hall with the Brady Campaign -- a national organization that advocates for common sense gun safety reforms.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/iTgQTZuB7zAoavalAQOVHNQuVtSglfl7s9UTpHuxBg4=)
---
| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/77H_1VqZoJpAiIXvU9TcnstfQbQjRw51KUWCnIkZDT8=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

Team -

This week my team and I did a virtual town hall with the Brady Campaign -- a national organization that advocates for common sense gun safety reforms.

Even in the midst of this pandemic, gun violence doesn't stop. Domestic violence is on the rise, and with new economic strains, crisis centers are also reporting an increase in mental health related calls.

[**We can 't continue this waiting game, team. Resources are needed now to help vulnerable Texans. Please take a moment to sign our petition to demand Congress take action on gun violence as they continue to tackle this pandemic.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/iTgQTZuB7zAoavalAQOVHNQuVtSglfl7s9UTpHuxBg4=) | [SIGN YOUR NAME »](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/iTgQTZuB7zAoavalAQOVHNQuVtSglfl7s9UTpHuxBg4=)
---

This is an issue that's very personal to me. Growing up in Houston, my family and I witnessed first-hand the epidemic of neighborhood gun violence. Together, I believe we CAN pass common sense reforms to make our communities safer and decrease firearm related deaths.

I truly believe that Texas has a real opportunity to lead on this issue, team. We can show the country that we are more than just our gun ownership -- we can set the example for what responsible gun ownership looks like.

Sign the petition to call on Congress to address COVID-19 related gun violence: [**https://act.myngp.com/Forms/-5584140891062268672**](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/iTgQTZuB7zAoavalAQOVHNQuVtSglfl7s9UTpHuxBg4=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he'll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://act.myngp.com/el/9uEpyxkRlL1GYIMfj9xx7zCZYvKAtKKd0gHdLnz2rxs=/BPhLlJxDGdIBC3-630tVSG2snEZcoodL3AzDkJ0YzyY=?refcode=Em_pet_2020.04.24_SKP_b1_all&amount=15)

name: Corky Messner
subject: Ivory Tower
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Outside Democrats are swooping in to sway the election, and must be stopped. Read more >>
Peter, As if there was any doubt that Jeanne Shaheen was a puppet of the top Democrats in Congress... Earlier this week, she put out a paid ad campaign to her followers bragging about being endorsed by her ultra-liberal colleagues Elizabeth Warren and Chuck Schumer. The Democrats know they can’t get a Senate majority without winning New Hampshire, and they’re pulling out all the stops, regardless of what’s best for Granite Staters. All they care about is power — dictating to citizens of our great state how they should vote with paid ad messaging about gaining “Senate control.” Here’s a better idea. Why don’t they come down out of their ivory tower and actually do something to help people who are losing their jobs and businesses now? **[Will you donate what you can now to kick Jeanne Shaheen out of her ivory tower?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/dd12babeefc6524e/920496eb5e52ee10c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Time matters in a crisis, and Jeanne Shaheen and her liberal buddies have now delayed additional Paycheck Protection Program funds for over a week. Small businesses are dying daily, and are desperate for relief. DC Jeanne is not fighting for New Hampshire small businesses — she’s fighting for her own partisan agenda as a puppet for Schumer and Warren. We need your help to get Jeanne Shaheen out of office. I’m not a career politician, and I won’t put petty political games ahead of the good people of New Hampshire, _especially in times of crisis._ I know things are tough for all of us, and I want you to take care of yourself and your loved ones first and foremost. But every dollar counts in the fight to win this seat, and we need your help. **[If you can, would you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can to help me win this race?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/dd12babeefc6524e/87f9b0ba8c46eb7ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We can’t leave it to the liberal elites to sway this election. Thanks for your support,
Cory Messner [ Donate now >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/dd12babeefc6524e/ff948c6b1a3742c1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/dd12babeefc6524e/98d90ca935b24009c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/dd12babeefc6524e/e1f78339a7f3a5b2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

**After nearly 20 years in DC doing Mitch McConnell's bidding, Sen. John Cornyn is fighting for his political future -- and MJ is the candidate to beat him!** But with the runoff extended, there will now be even less time to campaign in a general election. **[That means we need your help NOW (if you're in a position to give) in order to build the campaign we need to win in November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890301/7f51f7bc/4f17a1b1/4ef10c43/3445002713/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-1yearanniversary-nd?refcode=email_20200424.1nd__1265__&amount=10")**

Poll after poll has shown the majority of Texans **don 't approve of the job John Cornyn is doing as their senator**, and a jaw-dropping 32% don't even know enough about him to rate his performance -- after TWO DECADES in office! It's no wonder **the nonpartisan Cook Political Report has already upgraded this race in MJ 's favor** \-- but we can't get complacent.

Sen. Cornyn's most recent fundraising report revealed that he now has nearly **$13 MILLION** cash on hand. With everything he's done for his special interest and corporate PAC donors over nearly 20 years in Washington, it's no surprise that they're going into overdrive to fill his campaign coffers and keep their ally in the Senate.

But MJ is doing things differently. She isn't taking any corporate PAC money -- instead, she's relying on grassroots supporters like you to help her build the campaign she needs to win this race. **We 're proud to be powered by more than 42,000 individual donors with an average online donation of just $23!

We can beat Sen. Cornyn but only with your grassroots support. Will you pitch in now, if you can, to help MJ win the nation's largest battleground state and this November?**

subject: Adapting to the times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|

Friend, As Oklahoma and our nation continues to grapple with COVID-19, the way we campaign has changed significantly. Traditional in-person fundraising and visiting voters door-to-door isn't possible at the moment. So we're reaching voters where they are - online and on the phone. To date, we have performed thousands of wellness checks on our fellow Oklahomans, held town halls on Facebook, and transitioned most of our campaign operations to digital platforms. [**As we look to fund this digital transition, can our campaign count on you to chip in $5 today?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/807TbdzVvEqVY46gWiRKpA/XJz9dQv8aiEBrsXXt9t1qg) With traditional fundraising events paused, we are counting on small dollar donors like you to keep our campaign running. Sincerely, Terry Neese

body:
Applications Due on May 14, 2020
Fellow Democrat,
**Reminder: Applications to become a Delegate to the National Convention are due May 14, 2020! **
We know these are unforeen times and we hope you and your loved ones are safe and well. A lot is changing for everyone and while some things are still uncertain, we do not want you to miss your opportunity to run to be a Delegate to the Democratic National Convention.
**Your applications to run for PLEO, District-Level, At-Large, and Alternates are all due on May 14, 2020 to the West Virginia Democratic Party/WVSDEC. **
**Your applications can be found at the following links:**
**The At-Large, District-Level, & Alternate Application may be found here: **[https://wvdemocrats.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/12/National-Convention-Delegate-Candidate-District_At-Large-2020.pdf](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252665/188010725/11721750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwZDc1Mi01MTg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCLfBVSuaik8UvzhUtRjs992xmkNJrO9cIXuc2hDj10=&emci=f0d4eedd-8d85-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d9d0d752-5186-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
**The PLEO Application may be found here: **[https://wvdemocrats.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/01/National-Convention-Delegate-Candidate-PLEO-2020.pdf](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252666/188010726/1579876901?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQwZDc1Mi01MTg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WCLfBVSuaik8UvzhUtRjs992xmkNJrO9cIXuc2hDj10=&emci=f0d4eedd-8d85-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=d9d0d752-5186-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=5094937)
**You may return your forms to us via email at Convention2020@wvdemocrats.com or via mail to our P.O Box listed below:**
**WVDP**
**P.O. Box 11926 **
**Charleston, WV 25339 **
**-**_Team WVDP _

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252868/188016116/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=&emci=1d0987b7-9885-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=22117f5a-5386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Hi Team, It’s Shayne from Margaret Good’s campaign for Congress. I hope you are doing well this evening. I know a lot is going on right now, but I wanted to take a minute to let you know about some of our campaign’s recent and significant milestones. As of today, we have received MORE than enough signatures to qualify to get Margaret on the ballot....
# **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252869/188016117/-756790116?refcode=E2390-20200423-ballot-graphic&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=)**
Thank you to everyone who worked so hard and hustled to get signatures over the last few months! All your hard work and pounding the pavement really paid off. **We’re so proud to announce that Margaret is officially on the ballot!** [**Will you continue to help Margaret get elected to Congress? Donate $5, $10, or $20 right now to help us keep up the momentum. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252870/188016118/-756790116?refcode=E2390-20200423-ballot-SL&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=) In addition to qualifying for the ballot, Margaret and our campaign have:
* Created a COVID-19 information page on our website to provide a consolidated source for news updates and resources to help keep our community safe. [**Click here to check it out → **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252871/188016119/-241073385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=&emci=1d0987b7-9885-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=22117f5a-5386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)
* Received endorsements from groups like Off the Sidelines, Emily’s List, Planned Parenthood, End Citizens United, [**and more!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252872/188016120/1044723957?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=&emci=1d0987b7-9885-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=22117f5a-5386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)
* Launched an exciting new webinar series called _In Good Company_ where Margaret talks with some of the most exciting names in politics. [**You can join now by registering here!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252873/188016121/121337317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=&emci=1d0987b7-9885-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=22117f5a-5386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644)

We will continue to keep everyone updated on the current situation and the progress of our campaign. Thank you for sticking with us and staying safe. Appreciate y’all, \--Shayne P.S. If you are interested in helping the campaign by volunteering some of your time, [**we would love to hear from you. Click here to get in touch with a member of our team. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252874/188016122/186034790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=&emci=1d0987b7-9885-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=22117f5a-5386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17252875/188016123/-756790116?refcode=E2390-20200423-ballot-SB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjExN2Y1YS01Mzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quMv8XRh6nht0uCSc2ne31a4bWqWP1SZ86yiTR9cjd8=)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Thank You for Your Commitment to Safety and Democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
This week we're dedicating our newsletter to you.
First, we know that for many, financial circumstances are very difficult right now. Which is why we are so thankful to all of you who contributed and helped us reach our $10,000 goal for state-of-the-art data visualization tools. Because of you, our candidates will have just one more tool to help them win in November. THANK YOU!
We've also seen a new level of creativity and ingenuity from our candidates and campaigns as we all find new ways to talk with voters in the midst of this pandemic. Campaigns are finding constituents, supporters are hosting virtual house parties, and candidates are flooding social media with their values, policy ideas, and brilliant thoughts on how to defeat the Republican supermajority in Tennessee and get Donald Trump out of the White House. Again, thank you.
Lastly, we've seen Democrats across the state prioritize Tennessee lives and push for safety first. We cannot thank you enough.
Again, we understand you may not be able to donate right now, but that doesn't mean you have to sit on the sidelines. There are so many opportunities to take meaningful action during this time by helping a candidate of your choice with peer-to-peer fundraising, hosting a virtual volunteer event, or making calls. Here are a few resources to help guide you through all the different ways you can help turn Tennessee blue:
*
Visit
our
online
website
training
hub
to
build
your
skills
or

some
ideas
[https://tndp.org/tndp-training-hub/]

[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdNjs4MVUazj75MXSIs-ic_6URg341C4-vgiW3aMWl66qsGLw/viewform?usp=sf_link]

[https://www.facebook.com/tndem/]
We applaud and thank every single one of you for your commitment to Tennessee lives and democracy during this time.
Thanks again,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]

clean_body: [] Peter, This week we're dedicating our newsletter to you. First, we know that for many, financial circumstances are very difficult right now. Which is why we are so thankful to all of you who contributed and helped us reach our $10,000 goal for state-of-the-art data visualization tools. Because of you, our candidates will have just one more tool to help them win in November. THANK YOU! We've also seen a new level of creativity and ingenuity from our candidates and campaigns as we all find new ways to talk with voters in the midst of this pandemic. Campaigns are finding constituents, supporters are hosting virtual house parties, and candidates are flooding social media with their values, policy ideas, and brilliant thoughts on how to defeat the Republican supermajority in Tennessee and get Donald Trump out of the White House. Again, thank you. Lastly, we've seen Democrats across the state prioritize Tennessee lives and push for safety first. We cannot thank you enough. Again, we understand you may not be able to donate right now, but that doesn't mean you have to sit on the sidelines. There are so many opportunities to take meaningful action during this time by helping a candidate of your choice with peer-to-peer fundraising, hosting a virtual volunteer event, or making calls. Here are a few resources to help guide you through all the different ways you can help turn Tennessee blue: Visit our online website training hub to build your skills or get some ideas [] Volunteer remotely with a campaign near you [] * Get to know your candidates every Thursday through Facebook Live for Cocktails and Questions [] We applaud and thank every single one of you for your commitment to Tennessee lives and democracy during this time. Thanks again, [] Mary Mancini Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. body:
Nancy Mace In HUGE Lead over republican opponents | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/breaking-a-huge-endorsement-1939377?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e2334c4303&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6ab223f299&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friends,

I promise, I'm trying to spare your inbox, but this is _**BREAKING news**_ I just have to share with you . . .

I am in the lead in a HUGE way! A new poll released just yesterday found I'm on track to win this Republican Primary **_without a run-off!_**
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=43e7d689b2&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| **["Nancy Mace is leading by 29 points with 42% of the vote. This not only makes her the overwhelming front-runner; it gives her some chance of avoiding a run-off entirely."](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=cc6990181f&e=f1831b4ca2) \- Club for Growth**

I've said it before and I'll say it again. **It is time to unite**. It is critically important we win back the Lowcountry in November.

In order to defeat my pro-impeachment opponent, Joe Cunningham, we must support a candidate who can **unite all of the Lowcountry together to WIN.**

It will take a truly independent voice to do so and my record proves I am not beholden to any one or any party, I have always put the Lowcountry First and stayed true to the fiscally conservative principles that so many of us believe in and want to see more of in Washington. I've consistently held the line even when it meant going against the establishment or members of my own party. [Read the polling memo: HERE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8c2bd5e139&e=f1831b4ca2) As always, thank you for your support, I could not do this without each and every one of you!

Most sincerely,

---

body:
Time and time again they are putting their radical agenda over the needs of American people. We cannot afford another two years of their socialist games. It's time for a change in Congress and that starts by protecting solid conservative held seats like TX-23.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b18RNvzreBcbx7w6tK8IkU86eCdyIjElts1puEnRi2Z5fucHvl35pvTWVeDP0yF6b67qZBawW2DcawDLMQ_bCyWA2Zsr300uN2eNs2UYAp610ztfMchkm3woQHU9ZcYRulTCqQk1s1rRglybwSkciPxsGv20g-DB8or64aaMEvhjCJNhBIDdykTQxxJXtNOiyBLapCD6C-yM55NgH3OYaqKBxpjIFi_Jy86-pVj3Wn_7Z1sV9EgxLqqD4GT9XCAioVYOnLoCDlxff6YYhYbqdiwf1K97SnolJEt8mcUF4n_T1PIuYwzwLmp2OXwqLNfLwecVTjG9phPgSmkJU2rkbc_j7WN5Enqali32NJ5ykSqUd0I6RhmGKPS39VIbcD3diaUWeTwis1YN4UpfVW3wgd53KkA27P1oyFj2yt5mcZQ=&c=9QPkL7diDPXdKNRri5h6IIMc623ExlrbwXaUMr39Ic6k8BOGEd3mGg==&ch=ifBhluRqJGI_o1bzPYoqFv1-sNAKTUzbcixciuZv0BHmtUeAFc3-zg==)
Friend,

First, the radical left spends MILLIONS on a taxpayer witch hunt to overturn a fairly won election.

Then, they hold up much-needed resources for individuals across the country.

Now, they are holding MILLIONS more for small businesses that are suffering because of the current crisis.

_**The radical left has gone too far.**_

Time and time again they are putting their radical agenda over the needs of American people. We cannot afford another two years of their socialist games. Then, they hold up much-needed resources for individuals across the country. Now, they are holding MILLIONS more for small businesses that are suffering because of the current crisis. The radical left has gone too far. Time and time again they are putting their radical agenda over the needs of American people. name: John Jackson
subject: President Trump and the WHO
body:
Friend, Ever since President Trump first hit the campaign trail years ago, he promised to put America First all the time.
Now, we find ourselves amid a global pandemic and nothing has changed.
When President Trump learned that the WHO may have mismanaged the response to COVID-19 and may have even aided the Chinese Communist Party in their deceit around the virus, our president CUT THEM OFF.
He believes that American taxpayers shouldn't foot the bill for an entity we may not be able to trust - especially when the U.S. makes up a disproportionate amount of the organization's funding.
**President Trump needs to know that the American people have his back during these trying times.[Senator Cornyn asked me to reach out to you to see whether you'd be willing to show our president that you are WITH HIM in his efforts to put America First. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vOA1FWdRbbegiG4xYvWPTQQhe0PXsxdZkU1oFlxOk9f440RQN-ellZk6QAPhXFwc7VRt5u-Sv-0szUI2pvVEDeQ8PfZok4AHyLOwEilHvS1XoMLR8HWdWNiNIRl44POB9jbtslWsUjYnHrbYW9emzTbPBHo66Kozl4XVCdBrdXKedQq1uGyAzHyR-2wOQngebYUIPACOSxft8en6Xa4MLA60VHVNi4TByPStYwY5tcJKiPyqQOIO6Wzn6iw6vpeym4vGFuTAXrYd_bbeBPZrwr7VXABxXsBTOSrNeyldmGKWIwFmz4gJnUc_irymAk0Fet-hlooL1kk=&c=B8sl-M1YIB-MG58H0N8b9SOYjSPPvBBSdvXrQBU_FgsBe9Zugsb70Q==&ch=jueOKZGmxz6jfjoH02Atxm5GBkn1eNkQq2k2kUmM7pLKAF3pO3TqsQ==)**

clean_body: Friend, Ever since President Trump first hit the campaign trail years ago, he promised to put America First all the time. Now, we find ourselves amid a global pandemic and nothing has changed. When President Trump learned that the WHO may have mismanaged the response to COVID-19 and may have even aided the Chinese Communist Party in their deceit around the virus, our president CUT THEM OFF. He believes that American taxpayers shouldn't foot the bill for an entity we may not be able to trust - especially when the U.S. makes up a disproportionate amount of the organization's funding. President Trump needs to know that the American people have his back during these trying times.== Will you chip in anything you can, right now, to send President Trump that message? == == President Trump needs to know that you are with him as he does everything in his power to keep Americans healthy, and to protect our nation's standing around the globe. == John Jackson == Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == \- that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. clean_body: A couple of weeks ago, we told you about a new dialer our campaign started using. Well, we’ve got good news and bad news. | | | Friend, ** A couple of weeks ago, we told you about a new dialer our campaign started using. Well, we’ve got good news and bad news. The good news is that the dialer has let us make exponentially more phone calls and our volunteers are absolutely crushing it. We just set a new record by making over 5,000 calls in just a few hours the other night! The bad news is that we have so many new volunteers, and the dialer has been so effective, that we are already about to go over our phone banking budget for the campaign. We can build this movement, but if we want to keep going, we need to expand our budget for phone banking. ** Take a look at some of the notes our volunteers wrote about the conversations they had. If you chip in today, we can keep having conversations like these: Thank you, Maya Handa, Digital Organizing Director | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: Chase Campaign Requests TV and Radio Debates In CD2 Primary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Chase Campaign Requests TV and Radio Debates In CD2 Primary
---
| ROSWELL, NM. - Today Claire Chase for Congress Campaign Manager Mike Berg sent a letter to Yvette Herrell Campaign Manager Dakotah Parshall and CD2 candidate Chris Mathys requesting radio and television debates.
The full letter is below.
---
| April 24, 2020

Dakotah Parshall Campaign Manager Yvette Herrell for Congress 1111 10th St. #404 Alamogordo, NM 88310

Chris Mathys Candidate Chris Mathys for Congress 3401 W. Picacho Avenue #1 Las Cruces, NM 88007

Dear Dakotah and Chris,
I write to formally request primary debates between the Republican CD2 candidates. We enjoyed the virtual candidate forum earlier this month in Lea County and the in-person forum earlier this year in Lincoln County. Voters deserve to know where we stand on the issues and we wish we could hold one of these forums in each county in CD2.
Unfortunately, we can no longer hold in-person forums and debates with audiences across the district because of the restrictions put in place by Governor Grisham. With that said, it is still important that we debate and show voters the differences between the candidates.
Video conferencing forums are one way to show voters where we stand, and we'll continue to participate in as many as we can, but we propose the following to reach the maximum number of voters:

1. At least one major televised debate.
2. At least one major radio debate.

We stand at the ready to reach out to local television and radio stations to lock in these debates. We have already begun preliminary discussions and interest in this race is high.
Please reach out to me at [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org) to accept or decline this invitation. We are excited to debate and hope you are too.
Sincerely,
Mike Berg
Campaign Manager Claire Chase for Congress PO Box 8010 Roswell, NM 88202
---
| ###
---

**But as the polls and analysis show, their attacks and attempts to save our opponent are nothing compared to the grassroots campaign we’re building.**
You’ve helped us outraise our opponent without taking a dime in corporate PAC money and (so far) ensured we’ve had the resources to fight back against the GOP’s nasty attacks against John. So, we’re depending on you now:

name: Booker HQ
subject: Join Cory in calling for a ban on overdraft fees during the COVID-19 crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Friends -- The coronavirus relief bill passed by Congress, the CARES Act, was intended to give financial relief to Americans affected by the health crisis. There were special protections put in place to make sure stimulus money couldn't be seized to pay off debts, but Steve Mnuchin is allowing big banks to collect overdraft and insufficient fund fees from the very consumers the bill was meant to protect. **As millions of Americans find themselves out of work, the last thing they should have to worry about is paying overdraft fees. That's why Cory joined forces with Senator Sherrod Brown to urge 14 of the banks who collect the most revenue in consumer charges to ban overdraft fees during the health crisis.** [**If you agree that banks should not charge overdraft fees during the global pandemic, add your name to their letter today. Click here to sign.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/ban-overdraft-fees-during-covid19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+that+banks+should+not+charg&utm_campaign=em200424&source=em200424") Overdraft fees already disproportionately affect those least able to afford them -- 80% of overdraft fees are only incurred by just 9% of accounts -- and it's these consumers who are most likely to receive stimulus checks due to recent hardship. **Government stimulus funds in the CARES Act were intended to help consumers navigate this crisis, not line the pockets of big banks by way of punitive fees.** [**Add your name if you agree: To ease the burden on consumers, banks should ban overdraft and non-sufficient funds fees and charges during this pandemic >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/ban-overdraft-fees-during-covid19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+if+you+agree+To+ease+the+b&utm_campaign=em200424&source=em200424") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/ban-overdraft-fees-during-covid19?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200424&source=em200424")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: House Passes $484B Coronavirus Small Business Relief Bill, Sends to Trump
body:
“To those 4.4 million Americans that were laid off this week—Congress owes you an apology,” McCarthy said. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d4677ef68&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **House Passes $484B Coronavirus Small Business Relief Bill, Sends to Trump**

“The House of Representatives Thursday overwhelmingly passed a $484 billion relief package to rescue small businesses, help hospitals and to expand testing, sending the fourth bipartisan coronavirus bill to President Trump's desk,” Marisa Schultz reports for Fox News.

Small businesses shouldn’t have had to wait for these additional funds, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) said on the chamber floor: It should have been passed immediately when the Trump Administration requested it on April 7.

“To those 4.4 million Americans that were laid off this week—Congress owes you an apology,” McCarthy said.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4ef4da36f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Of all the frustrating, unhelpful reporting that’s happened during the current health scare, most maddening is the constantly repeated statistic about the United States having _more deaths than any other country_. Yes — the U.S. is also much larger than any of the other countries giving us an honest or accurate count.” The U.S. death rate is far below that of many European nations, Eddie Scarry writes in the [_**Washington Examiner**_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7141bef37d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| The U.S. Navy Blue Angels and the Air Force Thunderbirds will do flyovers of major American cities in honor of our heroic medical workers, President Trump announced. “It's really a signal to all Americans to remain vigilant during the outbreak. This is a tribute to them, to our warriors,” he said. Read more from Tyler Olson in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ecc6f6f09&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Researchers at NASA developed a ‘high-pressure’ ventilator for treating the coronavirus in just 37 days and it is seeking expedited approval from the FDA . . . The new machine can be built more quickly and uses fewer parts than a traditional ventilator, according to NASA,” Marina Pitofsky reports in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=67273e7964&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

Friend,

Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats _can_ take back the Senate this November - but it will all come down to what happens here in Georgia.
That's why this news is so incredible: **The Cook Political Report just UPGRADED our chances of winning this key race, shifting their rating in Democrats' direction!**
But I'm worried, friend. The momentum we've created right out of the gate has the GOP on high alert. My wealthy Republican opponent, who brags she's "100% supportive" of Trump, has now pledged to spend $20 MILLION of her own personal fortune to buy this seat and strengthen Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate.
**Friend, that's where you come in. If we're going to fight back against the GOP's massive war chest, take back the Senate for Democrats and flip Georgia blue, we need to raise another $12,358 by midnight tonight - but time is running out, and we're falling just short of our goal.**

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **-April 24, 2020-** **-We want to hear from you-** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255399/188060192/-646092391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535)** Across the state, Hoosiers are feeling the impact of COVID-19. Too often, the experience told on the news isn't reflective of every community. We want to ensure we hold legislators accountable, and every community has access to the resources to rebuild. And we want to hear from you. You can help by completing this quick **_[survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255400/188060193/-646092391?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535)_** to help us understand how your community and family have been impacted by COVID-19. **-Republicans block safe and secure vote-by-mail proposals-** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255401/188060194/-933379051?refcode=FFF4.24&amount=20.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=)** Republican Election Commission members voted down a number of proposals put forth by Democrats to maximize the safety and security of Hoosier voters. They blocked things like mailing every voter an application to vote by mail and extending the deadline a vote-by-mail ballot can be requested. You can find the full list of proposals they rejected in the video **_[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255402/188060195/1745149176?refcode=FFF4.24&amount=20.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=)_**. Hoosier Democrats have been fervent supporters of voting by mail. It is secure, convenient, and the only way to keep both voters and poll workers safe. The GOP has made it clear: they’re willing to throw out Hoosier voters’ safety to thwart even the perception of expanded voting rights. It’s on us to make sure no Hoosier has to put their health on the line to cast their ballot. We’re relying on our 100%-grassroots-funded, [Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255403/188060196/1745149176?refcode=FFF4.24&amount=20.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=) to get every Hoosier the tools they need to vote safely in the primary. [Will you give $8.50 to help us build our Vote-by-Mail Outreach Initiative?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255404/188060197/-933379051?express_lane=true&amount=8.50&refcode=FFF4.24express_lane_8.50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=) **-Black Hoosiers are disproportionately affected by COVID-19- ** **** African Americans make up about 10% of Indiana’s population but account for [18% of COVID-19 cases](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255405/188060198/1497249342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) and 20% of deaths. White Hoosiers, on the other hand, make up 85% of the population, but they comprise 50% of cases and 66% of deaths. The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus has taken action to address these disparities. State Rep. Robin Shackleford, chair of the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus, addressed the issue and potential solutions in a letter to Gov. Holcomb and State Health Commissioner, Dr. Kristina Box. Now, the Caucus is working to improve these issues in wake of COVID-19. Their priorities include creating a disparity task force, providing COVID-19 testing in majority-Black neighborhoods, and ensuring that essential workers have the right to sick leave and hazard pay. **-The Holcomb administration rejects donation of COVID-19 tests-** **** On April 6th, Indiana health commissioner Dr. Kristina Box said the goal was to reach [6,300 tests a day](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255406/188060199/1856208887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) in the coming weeks. Nearly three weeks later, Indiana is still short of that goal, with testing falling from week to week. Last week’s total number of tests conducted was over [1,000 tests less](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255407/188060200/290822794?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) than the week before. Meanwhile, the Holcomb administration is [refusing test kits](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255408/188060201/1128860318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) from an Indianapolis lab offering to “donate as many as Indiana needs.” [Over 99% of the Hoosier population](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17255409/188060202/1162251050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2RkOTEzNi02Njg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZUgXOvBZW5UEo-tsvkDSuqYdd5Ui_BOegFY1ysu8eg=&emci=8da04d5a-2386-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=07dd9136-6686-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) is unaware of their COVID-19 status, and our Governor is turning down donations of tests. We’re calling on Gov. Holcomb to step up and get Hoosiers COVID-19 tests now. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -April 24, 2020- -We want to hear from you- Across the state, Hoosiers are feeling the impact of COVID-19. Too often, the experience told on the news isn't reflective of every community. We want to ensure we hold legislators accountable, and every community has access to the resources to rebuild. And we want to hear from you. You can help by completing this quick to help us understand how your community and family have been impacted by COVID-19. -Republicans block safe and secure vote-by-mail proposals- = Republican Election Commission members voted down a number of proposals put forth by Democrats to maximize the safety and security of Hoosier voters. They blocked things like mailing every voter an application to vote by mail and extending the deadline a vote-by-mail ballot can be requested. You can find the full list of proposals they rejected in the video =. Hoosier Democrats have been fervent supporters of voting by mail. It is secure, convenient, and the only way to keep both voters and poll workers safe. The GOP has made it clear: they’re willing to throw out Hoosier voters’ safety to thwart even the perception of expanded voting rights. It’s on us to make sure no Hoosier has to put their health on the line to cast their ballot. We’re relying on our 100%-grassroots-funded, = to get every Hoosier the tools they need to vote safely in the primary. = -Black Hoosiers are disproportionately affected by COVID-19- ** African Americans make up about 10% of Indiana’s population but account for and 20% of deaths. White Hoosiers, on the other hand, make up 85% of the population, but they comprise 50% of cases and 66% of deaths. The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus has taken action to address these disparities. State Rep. Robin Shackleford, chair of the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus, addressed the issue and potential solutions in a letter to Gov. Holcomb and State Health Commissioner, Dr. Kristina Box. Now, the Caucus is working to improve these issues in wake of COVID-19. Their priorities include creating a disparity task force, providing COVID-19 testing in majority-Black neighborhoods, and ensuring that essential workers have the right to sick leave and hazard pay. -The Holcomb administration rejects donation of COVID-19 tests- On April 6th, Indiana health commissioner Dr. Kristina Box said the goal was to reach in the coming weeks. Nearly three weeks later, Indiana is still short of that goal, with testing falling from week to week. Last week’s total number of tests conducted was over than the week before. Meanwhile, the Holcomb administration is from an Indianapolis lab offering to “donate as many as Indiana needs.” is unaware of their COVID-19 status, and our Governor is turning down donations of tests. We’re calling on Gov. Holcomb to step up and get Hoosiers COVID-19 tests now. Sign on to the petition =. -Hoosiers aren’t getting the unemployment help they need- In wake of COVID-19, hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers have filed for unemployment. The previous record for unemployment claims in a week was . Now it is almost 5X that number at nearly . But they aren’t getting the help they need. People that still have yet to receive word on their status. And many have reported being on hold with the Department of Workforce Development for . Bottom line: Hoosier families need unemployment benefits now, but the Holcomb administration is failing to help. -Resources- You have 10 DAYS to register to vote in the June 2 primary. Register to vote by May 4 . You have 27 DAYS to apply to vote by mail in the June 2 primary. Apply by May 21 . Need a hand applying to vote by mail? Check out the = for deadlines and instructions on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot. You can also find a 30-second video on how to fill out your vote by mail application =. ¿Hablas español? ¿Quieres votar por el correo? Tenemos un diagrama para ti y una aplicación . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of = across our state . -Save the date- Cass County: \- Every Saturday, 9-10 AM EST, Virtual Planned Parenthood Advocates of Indiana and Kentucky: \- April 24, 10 AM-7 PM EST, Virtual Indiana Federation of Democratic Women: \- April 25, 2-3 PM EST, Zoom meeting Cass County: \- April 28, 6:30-8 PM EST, Virtual Boone County: \- April 29, 6:30-8:30 PM EST, Zoom meeting Cass County: \- May 12, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Allen County: \- May 16, 10-11 AM EST, Virtual Cass County: \- May 21, 5-6 PM EST, Virtual Cass County: \- May 21, 6-7 PM EST, Virtual Tippecanoe County: \- May 21st, 6:30-7:30 PM EST, Zoom meeting Allen County: \- May 22, 6-7 PM EST, Fort Wayne | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: No retreat. No surrender.
body:
TTV sues to stop Nevada Sec of State from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat | | |
# [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1decf66fb1&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
Dear Friend
First New Mexico, now Nevada.

I've included the full press release at the bottom of the email, but here's the short version - politicos and power brokers are seizing upon the COVID crisis as their opportunity to control the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair.
---
| [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=8d24febc6b&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
We're fighting in the courts to protect your voting rights from being stolen by rogue bureaucrats and radical agendas! Thank you for helping support these critical cases!
| What happens in these states will spread across the country. We cannot stand by and watch.

We are fighting for you, for your children, for our freedom. No retreat. No surrender.

**[Thank you for your continued support. We are ALL in this together.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2e519f220f&e=ad8cba7e98)**

Stay tuned. More to come!

Onward -

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

**[P.S. We are not doing this because we have a war chest of resources. We don't. We are counting on your support. Please help. We need to raise millions - and every penny is being put towards these fights. ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=cba652c3b6&e=ad8cba7e98)**
---
| [ SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ad85c36131&e=ad8cba7e98 " SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE")
---
| _**Here's the full press release:**_
**True the Vote Sues Nevada to Protect Voters’ Rights ** **_Asks court to stop Nevada secretary of state from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat because it removes safeguards against fraudulent votes; usurps the legislature; and violates citizens_** ’ **_constitutional rights_**
True the Vote has filed suit in the U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada on behalf of three registered Nevada voters asking for declaratory and injunctive relief to halt the secretary of state’s imposition of an “universal mail-in election” (Stanley William Paher, et al. v. Barbara Cegavske, in her capacity as Nevada Secretary of State and Deanna Spikula, in her official capacity as Registrar of Voters for Washoe County (No. 3:20-cv-00243)). The lawsuit argues the secretary of state’s mail-in-balloting plan violates both the Nevada and United States Constitutions and that imposing a universal mail-in balloting would lead to widespread election fraud. On March 24, 2020, supposedly in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, Republican Secretary of State Barbara Cegavske bent to demands by Democrats and state administrators and [announced a plan](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=249351b47c&e=ad8cba7e98) essentially to abolish in-person voting and conduct, instead, the June 9, 2020 primary election by universal mail-in balloting. According to the plan, all active registered voters in Nevada automatically will be mailed a primary-election ballot for mail-in voting. Voters are not required to take any action or steps, such as submitting an application, in order to receive a ballot, as required in traditional absentee balloting.
True the Vote claims specifically that the secretary of state’s plan to impose universal mail-in voting (“all-mail” voting) violates citizens’ right to vote because it:
* removes safeguards against fraudulent votes that dilute legal votes;
* violates citizens’ rights to vote in federal elections with the manner of election chosen by the state legislature;
* usurps elected representatives’ constitutional prerogative to choose the manner of election and replaces the electoral system devised by the legislature with a plan devised and implemented by unelected administrators and political appointees;
* transgresses the U.S. Supreme Court’s repeated admonition (based on the so-called “Purcell Principle”) that the courts ordinarily should not alter election rules on the eve of an election, which, because the Principle is anchored in the right to vote and its potential debasement, applies equally to political appointees and state and local election administrators as well; and
* violates citizens’ right to a republican form of government guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution.

On April 16th, in a separate suit, Nevada Democrats pressed even further, [suing ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3fed8d3acb&e=ad8cba7e98) to force Secretary Cegavske to mail ballots to every name in the voter registry, not just active registrations. Additionally, they seek to weaken current state rules that invalidate ballots because of mismatched signatures and prohibit vote harvesting.
True the Vote’s lawsuit filed against Nevada today comes less than a month after winning a [stunning](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a281323a7d&e=ad8cba7e98) victory for election integrity in New Mexico, stopping the state’s efforts to impose universal mail-in voting. On March 30, a group of New Mexico county clerks together with the secretary of state, [petitioned](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=35bf4056e8&e=ad8cba7e98) the Supreme Court to shut down all in-person voting in the June 2 New Mexico primary election and impose, instead, universal mail-in voting.
On April 14, the New Mexico Supreme Court unanimously rejected the bureaucrats’ demand for the Court to go over the legislature’s head and impose universal mail-in balloting from the bench. Instead, the Court directed county clerks to mail absentee ballot applications to all registered voters, preserving the option to vote by mail while still supporting security measures to protect against fraud.
“Three weeks ago, we prevailed with the New Mexico Supreme Court to stop an unconstitutional scheme that would have imposed universal mail-in voting from the bench. Today we are in federal court to defend the rights of Nevada voters,” said True the Vote President Catherine Engelbrecht. “These are just two of many states that are being used in a well-orchestrated globalist scheme to intentionally destabilize state run election processes, giving free-range to fraud in ways that will remain long after the fog of COVID has lifted. This is a blatant attempt to silence the voice of the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair. We’re asking all American voters to stand with us in defense of voters’ rights. Make no mistake, if we do not act now to preserve our liberties, they will be taken from us.”
James Bopp, Jr., of The Bopp Law Firm PC, lead counsel for the Nevada Voters, and General Counsel for True the Vote Voters’ Rights Initiative says: “There are national implications for voters nationwide. There is no precedent for such an extraordinary bureaucratic action to overturn laws passed laws by the Legislature to regulate voting in state elections and to put the bureaucrats in charge. Should these politicians succeed in Nevada, it would create a precedent for others to follow and to impose similarly unprotected and unrestricted voting procedures though bureaucratic fiat.” [**Plaintiffs** ’ **Preliminary-Injunction Motion**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=6f177bc229&e=ad8cba7e98) [**Complaint for Declaratory and Injunctive Relief**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f66dd9b586&e=ad8cba7e98)
### [True the Vote](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=01969930c2&e=ad8cba7e98) (TTV) is an IRS-designated 501(c)3 voters' rights organization, founded to inspire and equip volunteers for involvement at every stage of our electoral process. TTV empowers organizations and individuals across the nation to actively protect the rights of legitimate voters, regardless of their political party affiliation. For more information, please visit [www.truethevote.org](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3e1cc64e03&e=ad8cba7e98).

clean_body: TTV sues to stop Nevada Sec of State from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat | | | | | Dear Friend First New Mexico, now Nevada. I've included the full press release at the bottom of the email, but here's the short version - politicos and power brokers are seizing upon the COVID crisis as their opportunity to control the American voter by destroying the processes that keep elections free and fair. | We're fighting in the courts to protect your voting rights from being stolen by rogue bureaucrats and radical agendas! Thank you for helping support these critical cases! | What happens in these states will spread across the country. We cannot stand by and watch. We are fighting for you, for your children, for our freedom. No retreat. No surrender. Stay tuned. More to come! Onward - Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | " SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE" | Here's the full press release: True the Vote Sues Nevada to Protect Voters’ Rights Asks court to stop Nevada secretary of state from imposing universal mail-in voting by administrative fiat because it removes safeguards against fraudulent votes; usurps the legislature; and violates citizens ’ constitutional rights True the Vote has filed suit in the U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada on behalf of three registered Nevada voters asking for declaratory and injunctive relief to halt the secretary of state’s imposition of an “universal mail-in election” (Stanley William Paher, et al. v. Barbara Cegavske, in her capacity as Nevada Secretary of State and Deanna Spikula, in her official capacity as Registrar of Voters for Washoe County (No. 3:20-cv-00243)). The lawsuit argues the secretary of state’s mail-in-balloting plan violates both the Nevada and United States Constitutions and that imposing a universal mail-in balloting would lead to widespread election fraud. On March 24, 2020, supposedly in response to the COVID-19 pandemic, Republican Secretary of State Barbara Cegavske bent to demands by Democrats and state administrators and essentially to abolish in-person voting and conduct, instead, the June 9, 2020 primary election by universal mail-in balloting. According to the plan, all active registered voters in Nevada automatically will be mailed a primary-election ballot for mail-in voting. Voters are not required to take any action or steps, such as submitting an application, in order to receive a ballot, as required in traditional absentee balloting. True the Vote claims specifically that the secretary of state’s plan to impose universal mail-in voting (“all-mail” voting) violates citizens’ right to vote because it: removes safeguards against fraudulent votes that dilute legal votes; violates citizens’ rights to vote in federal elections with the manner of election chosen by the state legislature; usurps elected representatives’ constitutional prerogative to choose the manner of election and replaces the electoral system devised by the legislature with a plan devised and implemented by unelected administrators and political appointees; transgresses the U.S. Supreme Court’s repeated admonition (based on the so-called “Purcell Principle”) that the courts ordinarily should not alter election rules on the eve of an election, which, because the Principle is anchored in the right to vote and its potential debasement, applies equally to political appointees and state and local election administrators as well; and violates citizens’ right to a republican form of government guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution. On April 16th, in a separate suit, Nevada Democrats pressed even further, to force Secretary Cegavske to mail ballots to every name in the voter registry, not just active registrations. clean_body: Wea€TMre at a serious disadvantage. == Harley Rouda, Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate, doubled our fundraising total last quarter -- putting us at a serious disadvantage. Friend, this is a top-tier, toss-up race and it 's going to be close. We're facing an uphill battle and we can't win if we're behind. Let's face it, the Democrats are scrambling because they know in a fair fight we'd win. == We're just days away from our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline. Whether or not we meet our goal will go a long way to determining the outcome in November. That 's why we've authorized an emergency 5X MATCH on all donations made by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. == == == == == Growing up, I watched my mom fall victim to a broken political system that was victimizing those it was built to serve and since then I've made it my mission to provide quick, conservative reforms to build a better, brighter California. This means no new taxes and no tax increases no matter what. This seat will be the deciding factor for the House Majority but I can't win it alone. == == Thank you, Michelle Steel == | With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. body:

In 2020, Arizona's Senate race is one of the most competitive in the country - Democrats have declared it a must-win to capture the Senate Majority and they're pouring millions into turning Arizona blue.

We are facing a stark reality. I have fought to clean up Washington and drain the swamp. I am now giving all I have to get immediate cash to families, seniors, workers, and small businesses to survive this pandemic while supporting our front-line health care heroes and fast-tracking treatments and vaccines. We've accomplished a lot since taking office and none of it would have been possible without your support...**But my work is far from done!**
[**Chip in $35, $50, $100 or ANY amount to help me continue fighting for YOU!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00182nf-oQ-pq2i_abYM1eboMwf44gDDPGlILnSLk0ZRw3S9fzO1zq-ILtciixt5mCis49p_Nrv-DQnw_ge6ZA2P-mnnWWBnM2AfHFhqmkVJFRv01xsvqK38LLsFpn1giTFz0uaKWXykcwFW2ng1QclliJJwrfMuPUdZsJC0kau13mHal3v3MdDSpslZRofRIjDa3D3h3JtiAEZMW6FdNzQjKYw1dWTIeimpqamHE4Hv2nb0zuwBiKGM7R1eIJr4CgvP3s7odHIZHQkm_wkdHDmSknRFZTzSuLfR9KRsxcaY9logyvWpTZ3L5QuTidxkiGmZam78vTyxrrBcq8MaJyK5xTOaPxIELO9q-VUGiNHG8H8V4afh0Eib8jYYBs49tTb-lV2tWUwAs5ooU-Tfzfj4a7pMZfbyVGyuIxQReq6s-VL7sVlYFL-qz6SL7ReDAti&c=PKCZy0J5v-cT-TvuTpMEv_gZmW8x0FEo59rVnnBy-xKIxKQAQEwnSw==&ch=n99BifKgjCZzOXP3vM04f7KuYcdilD2yuOShBiDexX-M4OAqKiZfvg==)

name: Faith & Freedom Coalition
subject: A plan to "shut down Christianity”
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNCZQf9qORqoBkUfnyEoNX1WBCy5XqnA8BjKIqlGS2Fby4MTp0It_rrmJKFFO9_EPDERW9YIdfU5Lyse3lUhBNrJiduA9PRrk29Gd5SCKSGu8zKPEFI7ANMCh155Kv1LqgbURbiVbjhZm4n76fRtE9iEvnvWAHL0Ox4SwfEe3v1ZoXVHOn4rHhdVDGmLIc96AIdBFKS8kEE=&c=YPTWA_l4JttnwnoHTKQLhsagIwh5ysXcCJfUN0mKqnc-DKZ13OPajg==&ch=dbwkdOgo9LORRI_54mLk7DzaUZwa-pdYFQiPgRPVM8YdyZmkErKUOA==) Dear Fellow American,
I pray that you're healthy, have plenty of food, and are safe during this time of crisis.
This global pandemic has created an interesting time for churches in America and has pitted pastors against local leaders.
**In Florida, a pastor was arrested for holding church -- despite his congregation abiding by proper social distancing guidelines -- yet abortion clinics are still operating in many states, where abortionists are continuing to come in direct contact with patients.**
_Tell me how it's right to arrest a pastor for ministering to his flock, yet allow an abortionist to continue murdering unborn children at a time such as this?_
It's plain wrong, unethical, and inhumane.
**[That's why we're fighting back on behalf of religious liberty and life here at Faith& Freedom Coalition!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNCZQf9qORqoBkUfnyEoNX1WBCy5XqnA8BjKIqlGS2Fby4MTp0It_rrmJKFFO9_EPDERW9YIdfU5Lyse3lUhBNrJiduA9PRrk29Gd5SCKSGu8zKPEFI7ANMCh155Kv1LqgbURbiVbjhZm4n76fRtE9iEvnvWAHL0Ox4SwfEe3v1ZoXVHOn4rHhdVDGmLIc96AIdBFKS8kEE=&c=YPTWA_l4JttnwnoHTKQLhsagIwh5ysXcCJfUN0mKqnc-DKZ13OPajg==&ch=dbwkdOgo9LORRI_54mLk7DzaUZwa-pdYFQiPgRPVM8YdyZmkErKUOA==)** [**Contribute**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNCZQf9qORqoBkUfnyEoNX1WBCy5XqnA8BjKIqlGS2Fby4MTp0It_rrmJKFFO9_EPDERW9YIdfU5Lyse3lUhBNrJiduA9PRrk29Gd5SCKSGu8zKPEFI7ANMCh155Kv1LqgbURbiVbjhZm4n76fRtE9iEvnvWAHL0Ox4SwfEe3v1ZoXVHOn4rHhdVDGmLIc96AIdBFKS8kEE=&c=YPTWA_l4JttnwnoHTKQLhsagIwh5ysXcCJfUN0mKqnc-DKZ13OPajg==&ch=dbwkdOgo9LORRI_54mLk7DzaUZwa-pdYFQiPgRPVM8YdyZmkErKUOA==) The outbreak of COVID-19 likely has you filled with anxiety, worry, and a sense of uncertainty. It's an unprecedented time we're living in, but the only way we'll get through this is _TOGETHER_.
We may all be isolated and confined to our homes, but now more than ever we need to turn to God, to the hope that He has a plan far greater than you, or I, or any government can understand.
We must pray for an end to this global pandemic, which has brought so much uneasiness to us all and has changed the way we live day-to-day.
**Ultimately though, when pastors are being arrested and abortion clinics are considered essential medical care in dozens of states, it sure seems like a plan by radicals to shut down Christianity.**
Don't believe me? New York City Mayor Bill De Blasio threatened to potentially close the building permanently if churches or synagogues in his city held worship services.
You and I both know that with Donald Trump as president, the doors of churches across America may be closed for now, but no one will never take our beliefs away, stop us from praying, or take away our faith that God will show himself in this.
But that doesn't mean the anti-God left won't try to exploit this crisis as an opportunity to chip away at our religious liberty, just as we're seeing them doing right now.
**[At Faith& Freedom Coalition, we're on the front lines of ensuring that leaders who support religious liberty and life are elected in 2020, which is why we need your support of $10, $25, $50, or whatever amount you can afford to fight back and defend our shared beliefs.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DNCZQf9qORqoBkUfnyEoNX1WBCy5XqnA8BjKIqlGS2Fby4MTp0It_rrmJKFFO9_EPDERW9YIdfU5Lyse3lUhBNrJiduA9PRrk29Gd5SCKSGu8zKPEFI7ANMCh155Kv1LqgbURbiVbjhZm4n76fRtE9iEvnvWAHL0Ox4SwfEe3v1ZoXVHOn4rHhdVDGmLIc96AIdBFKS8kEE=&c=YPTWA_l4JttnwnoHTKQLhsagIwh5ysXcCJfUN0mKqnc-DKZ13OPajg==&ch=dbwkdOgo9LORRI_54mLk7DzaUZwa-pdYFQiPgRPVM8YdyZmkErKUOA==)**
In 2020, we must focus on registering 5 million new Christian voters.
We need to send more than 100 million pieces of voter mail to educate our brothers and sisters in Christ about the importance of standing up for our values and protecting religious liberty.
And we have to turn out 18 million Christian conservative voters including those already registered and newly registered to support candidates who will uphold our rights.
**To fully execute this plan, we need your immediate gift to stand up to the resources of the radical left, who want to close the doors of churches and keep the doors of Planned Parenthood open.**
