clean_body: == Dear Fellow American, I pray that you're healthy, have plenty of food, and are safe during this time of crisis. This global pandemic has created an interesting time for churches in America and has pitted pastors against local leaders. In Florida, a pastor was arrested for holding church -- despite his congregation abiding by proper social distancing guidelines -- yet abortion clinics are still operating in many states, where abortionists are continuing to come in direct contact with patients. Tell me how it's right to arrest a pastor for ministering to his flock, yet allow an abortionist to continue murdering unborn children at a time such as this? It's plain wrong, unethical, and inhumane. == == The outbreak of COVID-19 likely has you filled with anxiety, worry, and a sense of uncertainty. It's an unprecedented time we're living in, but the only way we'll get through this is TOGETHER. We may all be isolated and confined to our homes, but now more than ever we need to turn to God, to the hope that He has a plan far greater than you, or I, or any government can understand. We must pray for an end to this global pandemic, which has brought so much uneasiness to us all and has changed the way we live day-to-day. Ultimately though, when pastors are being arrested and abortion clinics are considered essential medical care in dozens of states, it sure seems like a plan by radicals to shut down Christianity. Don't believe me? New York City Mayor Bill De Blasio threatened to potentially close the building permanently if churches or synagogues in his city held worship services. You and I both know that with Donald Trump as president, the doors of churches across America may be closed for now, but no one will never take our beliefs away, stop us from praying, or take away our faith that God will show himself in this. But that doesn't mean the anti-God left won't try to exploit this crisis as an opportunity to chip away at our religious liberty, just as we're seeing them doing right now. == In 2020, we must focus on registering 5 million new Christian voters. We need to send more than 100 million pieces of voter mail to educate our brothers and sisters in Christ about the importance of standing up for our values and protecting religious liberty. And we have to turn out 18 million Christian conservative voters including those already registered and newly registered to support candidates who will uphold our rights. To fully execute this plan, we need your immediate gift to stand up to the resources of the radical left, who want to close the doors of churches and keep the doors of Planned Parenthood open. == == God bless, Dr. Ralph Reed Founder and Chairman Faith & Freedom Coalition PO Box 957736, Duluth, GA. 30095-9529 | | Faith & Freedom Coalition | PO Box 957736, Duluth, GA 30095-9529 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net in collaboration with |

Hey Peter!

With all in-person events suspended, we need your help to reach voters where they're at: ONLINE! We're proud of the ads we've run so far (remember Carpool?), but we need your help to keep it up. **[That's why today we're announcing a one-day goal of raising $15,000 for our Digital Ad Fund!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890302/7f51f7bc/4f2896f2/4ef10cda/3087059387/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.2nd__1277__&amount=10")**

If you can, even $1 can make a big difference! With 90% of donations under $100, a few bucks here and there when you can really does add up, and we need them to run an effective ad campaign -- **[so rush a donation now (if you can) to help us hit our one-day goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890302/7f51f7bc/4f2896f2/4ef10cd9/3087059387/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.2nd__1277__&amount=1")**

\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890302/7f51f7bc/4f2896f2/4ef10cda/3087059387/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-digitaladfund?refcode=email_20200424.2nd__1277__&amount=10")**

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890302/7f51f7bc/4f2896f2/4ef10cd8/3087059387/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNzcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1277&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890302/7f51f7bc/4f2896f2/4ef10cdf/3087059387/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Nikki Foster
subject: Protecting democracy during a pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | Is Ohio doing enough to make its mail-in election fair? Sadly, I think we all know the answer to this question: [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1") When public health was endangered, Ohio rose to the moment and protected its people. But let's be real**: our brand-new, entirely-by-mail election isn 't going to be 100% smooth sailing.** For example, today is the last full day for folks to request their ballots.**This week, we 've been spending all of our efforts on getting this vital information out to voters, because honestly, most people don't know about these new deadlines.** [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1") **I 'm not giving up on democracy.** After this push to inform people about requesting ballots, our next challenge is informing them how -- and WHEN -- to submit them. And we only have 4 days to do so. [**Please, in order to make sure people know how to exercise their fundamental right to vote -- will you pitch in to help us meet our goal of $25,000? We need to raise $4,000 TODAY to stay on track!**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Please+in+order+to+make+sure+people+know&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200424_Democracy_U2_X1")

name: Tina Smith
subject: I owe you an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is next week, and I want to explain why this is such an important moment — let me start from the beginning: My first job in Minnesota was at General Mills. My husband Archie and I moved to St. Louis Park, had two children, and found our life here. After that, I started my own business and spent my time volunteering in our community. I loved every second of it. That’s what fueled my passion for my work with Planned Parenthood, where I championed women and their families, and it's a big part of what brought me to the United States Senate. **You see, I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I ran because I wanted to make a difference in people’s lives. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too.** I've spent so much of my life fighting for the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but I have so much work left to do. So, here’s the part where I ask for your help: **Will you add a donation to our re-election campaign today? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. clean_body: | Friend — In a few moments, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Minnesota. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is next week, and I want to explain why this is such an important moment — let me start from the beginning: My first job in Minnesota was at General Mills. My husband Archie and I moved to St. Louis Park, had two children, and found our life here. After that, I started my own business and spent my time volunteering in our community. I loved every second of it. That’s what fueled my passion for my work with Planned Parenthood, where I championed women and their families, and it's a big part of what brought me to the United States Senate. You see, I didn’t run for public office for fame, money, or power. I ran because I wanted to make a difference in people’s lives. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. I've spent so much of my life fighting for the people of Minnesota and folks across the country, but I have so much work left to do. So, here’s the part where I ask for your help: Will you add a donation to our re-election campaign today? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Anything you give before our end-of-month deadline would mean the world to me. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign and my work for the people of Minnesota. Every dollar you give allows me to continue fighting for our values in Washington — and if we're successful in the coming months, I'll get the chance to continue our important work. I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on. I cannot tell you how grateful I am that you're a part of this. But please, only give if you can afford to do so. Thank you. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Update from the campaign trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vB9A0y3wIs-Br2IMuRoRgAxeZCgr7MAuqEAaXkoG8rwfW0sEW94_9T3K88KHj8BFQ_DA5Awrg1n7d7fEv-ZqezIN41eA8eVmtsHJzGzqGrMuWGmyRXlySw_EEFQQaTt0ITtjfJpdEZ1VwcplwmIdXmxNIKwqWp7oV7U2Fa9UWY2TM3NlLZKifw==&c=rH5IhoWfA3j3LqtOpQMLGeRkV69xTEzn9hPSWrqo3AZcl5mpXFWDYA==&ch=A0PIjx-HLMXvWaj9KSD_bQL9by1n3PiBKGAlxtaDMP-f2-ZEmZNsMQ==)
---
| Peter,
It was another week of social distancing and virtual campaigning, but we've been keeping the momentum going!
Today, we received the endorsement of the Susan B. Anthony List, one of the nation's premier pro-life organizations! In Congress, I will always stand up for the most vulnerable among us.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Standing Up to China
---
| We can't ignore the Chinese government's culpability when it comes to the coronavirus crisis. They lied for their own benefit and threatened the health of the entire world.
When I'm in Congress, I will always be tough on the Chinese government and I'll work to hold them accountable for their actions.
Click/tap the screenshot to watch the whole video I recently posted discussing the unfolding situation with China.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vB9A0y3wIs-Br2IMuRoRgAxeZCgr7MAuqEAaXkoG8rwfW0sEW94_9eL8iQOWEBQ8RrTuTBP7LW6QfBkt6YkAGvfyBv1ArZExkHh6aLWMv6w2pkBGv1F1vHcSQa1WJDuoR0pVCuu3xsh99grtaM65wghmejnR-8lxwubt3Vi4qySFrRG3pS_VH4YXJJ_2tQIX&c=rH5IhoWfA3j3LqtOpQMLGeRkV69xTEzn9hPSWrqo3AZcl5mpXFWDYA==&ch=A0PIjx-HLMXvWaj9KSD_bQL9by1n3PiBKGAlxtaDMP-f2-ZEmZNsMQ==)
---
| Supporting Local Business
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vB9A0y3wIs-Br2IMuRoRgAxeZCgr7MAuqEAaXkoG8rwfW0sEW94_9eL8iQOWEBQ87EffJyZ7ez2aRrylgkl4a_93sEyYwj-gTovXpx23eiqwISjTC7hQdGAm70V5PQdAz1L1frYraz4=&c=rH5IhoWfA3j3LqtOpQMLGeRkV69xTEzn9hPSWrqo3AZcl5mpXFWDYA==&ch=A0PIjx-HLMXvWaj9KSD_bQL9by1n3PiBKGAlxtaDMP-f2-ZEmZNsMQ==)
---
| Finally, it's important that we always support the local businesses in our communities.
This week, we launched our first Small Business Spotlight on social media. This will be a place where we highlight small businesses that are doing good things in our community.
Our first spotlight was on the Everybody Eats initiative, that is helping provide free meals to anybody in D-FW who has lost their job due to COVID-19.
You can learn more by visiting their website at [this link.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vB9A0y3wIs-Br2IMuRoRgAxeZCgr7MAuqEAaXkoG8rwfW0sEW94_9eL8iQOWEBQ87EffJyZ7ez2aRrylgkl4a_93sEyYwj-gTovXpx23eiqwISjTC7hQdGAm70V5PQdAz1L1frYraz4=&c=rH5IhoWfA3j3LqtOpQMLGeRkV69xTEzn9hPSWrqo3AZcl5mpXFWDYA==&ch=A0PIjx-HLMXvWaj9KSD_bQL9by1n3PiBKGAlxtaDMP-f2-ZEmZNsMQ==)
---
| Finally, many Texas businesses were allowed to reopen today for limited to-go shopping, an encouraging sign that things are slowly getting back to normal. We've still got a long way to go, and I look forward to Gov. Abbott's announcement next week detailing the reopening of the Texas economy.
---
| As always, I hope you, your family, and all your loved ones are staying healthy and safe. If there is anything we can do for you, don't hesitate to let me know.
Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, It was another week of social distancing and virtual campaigning, but we've been keeping the momentum going! Today, we received the endorsement of the Susan B. Anthony List, one of the nation's premier pro-life organizations! In Congress, I will always stand up for the most vulnerable among us. | | | | | Standing Up to China | We can't ignore the Chinese government's culpability when it comes to the coronavirus crisis. They lied for their own benefit and threatened the health of the entire world. When I'm in Congress, I will always be tough on the Chinese government and I'll work to hold them accountable for their actions. Click/tap the screenshot to watch the whole video I recently posted discussing the unfolding situation with China. | == | Supporting Local Business | == | Finally, it's important that we always support the local businesses in our communities. This week, we launched our first Small Business Spotlight on social media. This will be a place where we highlight small businesses that are doing good things in our community. Our first spotlight was on the Everybody Eats initiative, that is helping provide free meals to anybody in D-FW who has lost their job due to COVID-19. You can learn more by visiting their website at == | Finally, many Texas businesses were allowed to reopen today for limited to-go shopping, an encouraging sign that things are slowly getting back to normal. We've still got a long way to go, and I look forward to Gov. Abbott's announcement next week detailing the reopening of the Texas economy. | As always, I hope you, your family, and all your loved ones are staying healthy and safe. If there is anything we can do for you, don't hesitate to let me know. Thank you and God bless, | | Genevieve Collins Candidate for Congressional District 32 | == | == == == | | | == | | | Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc. | | Collins for Texas, Inc. | 6119A Greenville Ave., Ste 423, Dallas, TX 75206 | | Sent by mailto:info@gcforcongress.com

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Shaheen's political games & China's deception
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/d3bd9c82e97c6bb7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Chinese Communist Party Deceptions Must be Dealt With, As We Consider the Pandemic A Wake-Up Call to Rebuild National Economic/Manufacturing Self-Sufficiency**
Corky Messner this week denounced the Chinese Community Party’s actions in covering up the coronavirus threat, while also urging that the United States use the hard lessons learned as a wake-up call to rebuild self-sufficiency and bring American business and manufacturing back home.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/e46f62dbd29f9fffc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
“There can be no arguing that the Chinese government’s deception and lies have led us to a world-wide pandemic that has cost lives and wreaked havoc on our economy and our way of life,” says Messner.

“Yet, given the negative impacts of the pandemic on our economy — job losses, business closures, and disruption of manufacturing, to name only three — we must rededicate ourselves to restoring our role in the world as an economic force for good.”

[**Read more**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/420685de06e19ff5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**In The News**
WMUR’s Primary Source reported that Dr. Stewart Levenson, who went public with charges of substandard care at the Veteran Affairs Medical Center in Manchester, and who ran for New Hampshire’s Second Congressional District seat in 2018, has endorsed Corky Messner.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/43c5035a52a379bfc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/2b6fb5bdf7d5534bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Also endorsing Corky is State Senator Ruth Ward (Stoddard-District 8), a retired nurse practitioner who has long been active in state Republican circles, along with four Republicans and community leaders from the Republican-heavy Salem-Windham area.

“We must regain New Hampshire’s Senate seat, and elect someone with values and vision that reflect our state’s tradition of conservativism,” says Levenson. “Corky is our best hope to elect someone who truly represents the people of New Hampshire.”

Dr. Levenson, a rheumatologist, was Chairman of the Department of Medicine at the VA Medical Center when, in 2017, he made headlines with allegations of substandard care of patients at the hospital. His actions resulted in the dismissal of several administrators and helped make possible $30 million in funding to improve the facility.

[**Read more**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/b021e4d643ce09cac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Senator Shaheen Playing Politics Meant a Long Delay in Needed Funding for N.H. Businesses**
The U.S. Senate finally approved a new coronavirus aid bill with nearly $500 billion total for businesses, hospitals and testing after Congress and the White House reached a deal, but Senator Jeanne Shaheen and her Democrat cronies delayed that approval by a week by playing politics.
[**As Corky told the _Union Leader_**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/f5ff2c8218763a68/c6b93ed56b7e9064c3d6b838967d376c/33153), “While I welcome this bipartisan agreement, the delay didn’t need to happen while Granite Staters suffered.”
|
---

body:
Did you see Drew's email? While Democrats are busy playing politics, Drew Ferguson and House Republicans are determined to find solutions to fight the public health crisis.
Friend,

Did you see Drew's email? Democrats are creating a new House Committee to investigate the Trump Administration's COVID-19 response.

**_This is an outright abuse of their power._**

House Democrats should be trying to find solutions to defeat this public health crisis. Instead, they are more concerned with creating a partisan committee in an effort to hurt Trump's re-election chances. This action by Democrats is wasting time and resources.

Defeating the coronavirus is imperative. It is not a time for Pelosi and her Far-Left allies to pass a liberal policy wish-list or to settle a rogue political score against the President.

While Democrats are busy playing politics, Drew Ferguson and House Republicans are determined to find solutions to fight the public health crisis. This includes providing families and small businesses with financial relief during these turbulent times.

[**Help us fight back. name: Team Michelle
subject: The LCV endorsed Michelle!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We're thrilled about the latest group to join Team Michelle!

Exciting news, friends -- the League of Conservation Voters (LCV) just endorsed Michelle De La Isla for Kansas' 2nd District!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17257850/188113429/-889060286?gpsid=8_122_12551&refcode=em20_200424_lcv_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200424_lcv_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjdiOGY5MC03Yzg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf-jj7zgbal5_xIips0ANDkFaPuScovQ0v6THqIysXE=)
The LCV is standing with Michelle De La Isla because they know we can trust her to fight for clean energy jobs and environmental protections in Congress. But her race is shaping up to be one of the most competitive in the country, so she needs your help if she's going to win.

Michelle knows how investing in clean energy is good not only for our environment, but for our economy. Kansas is one of our country's leaders in wind energy production, which has helped create thousands of clean energy jobs for Kansans.

In Congress, Michelle would work to ensure Kansas continues to be a leader in clean energy, and fight to expand environmental protections. But she's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help get her there.

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: The special election on May 12th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

This November is going to be the most important election in our lifetimes. It's about moving forward versus staying trapped in chaos, and it's an opportunity to adjust our country's moral compass.

But there is another important election coming up even sooner.

Democrats are fortunate to have Christy Smith running in the special election for California's 25th House district.

This is the first Toss-Up congressional election in the wake of this global crisis, and it is crucial that Christy Smith is elected on May 12th. We need leaders like her in Congress making the important decisions about how we recover from this pandemic.

Special elections get a lot of attention, and special interest groups have pledged to put a lot of money into this race to help Christy's opponent. We need you to step up today to make sure we send Christy to Congress.

**[So I'm asking you today to join me in supporting Christy Smith. Can you make a contribution of $5 or any amount you can to her campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6905/179961123/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full")**

This race will be a bellwether: If we win, it will show that the country is ready for new leadership; ready for a government that respects each and every one of us; ready to be led with dignity, especially during times of crisis.

We need adults at the table making the decisions. Leaders who will cut through hyper-partisan rhetoric, put their heads down, and get to work to help people get through this unprecedented crisis.

Christy will be that leader -- but **right now Republicans are spending $1 million on TV ads to stop Christy from getting there.** And now the race is officially a "Toss-Up" by Cook Political Report, Politico, and Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball.

**[I'm ready to see people like Christy in Congress -- can you chip in today to make sure she's in this fight with us?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6905/179961123/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6906/179961123/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6907/179961123/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6902/179961123/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb67/29776869/a22e7c8/569f6905/179961123/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjRfcGV0ZWJ1dHRpZ2llZy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200424_petebuttigieg-full")

Pete Buttigieg

name: Charles Booker
subject: I want to tell you why I’m the candidate that can beat Mitch McConnell.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I’m not the first person to run against Mitch McConnell. Plenty of them have tried, but Mitch has remained in power for 36 years. Why? Because we haven’t had a real Democrat run against Mitch yet.
#
I want to tell you why I’m the candidate that can beat Mitch McConnell.
**[After you finish reading my explanation — I hope you can chip in $5 to support our grassroots campaign. This election is the best chance we’ve had in years to turn Kentucky blue and with your help, we can get the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258159/188117535/2120402708?refcode=em20200424&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=)**
****[Chip in to defeat Mitch](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258160/188117536/2120402708?refcode=em20200424&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=)****
I’m not the first person to run against Mitch McConnell. Plenty of them have tried, but Mitch has remained in power for nearly 36 years.
Why? **Because we haven’t had a real Democrat run against Mitch yet.**
We haven’t had a candidate yet that’s proud to run as a true Democrat in Kentucky, that’s proud to advocate for progressive issues and values. Time after time, someone challenges Mitch and they’re only focused on running to the “middle-of-the-road.” They frame their policy platform around attracting Republicans. They accept money from whoever they can, even if that means the fossil fuel industry or Big Pharma because they feel small against Mitch’s super PACs. And most importantly — they don’t offer solutions that speak to the real problems families in Kentucky face.
**I’m not that kind of candidate.** This campaign is more than what we’ve seen in the past, it’s about sparking a political revolution in Kentucky that empowers people to fight for the change they believe in. We don’t make decisions based on what’s politically convenient, but what’s most important for the people we plan to serve.
**That’s why this campaign is proud to advocate for issues like Medicare for All, a universal basic income, criminal justice reform, a Green New Deal, and the priorities of working people.**
It’s clear to me after speaking with thousands of Kentuckians and listening to their stories for more than a year that this state is hungry for bold, progressive change. It’s clear to me that we must do things differently from the past if we want to finally defeat Mitch once and for all.
**[Will you chip in $5 so our campaign can get this done this election? I’m going to need a grassroots army at my back if we want to continue growing the progressive movement that’s rising in Kentucky.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258174/188117550/2120402708?refcode=em20200424&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258175/188117551/2120402708?refcode=em20200424&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=)****
Let's do this,
Charles

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258176/188117552/2120402708?refcode=em20200424-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=)****
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258177/188117553/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=&emci=bb03cc8f-7786-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a28eabd4-7f86-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258178/188117554/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=&emci=bb03cc8f-7786-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a28eabd4-7f86-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17258179/188117555/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjhlYWJkNC03Zjg2LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d5LuXDClVib87ne30h8dQUARVKIiqogN5FnlJWhLa8s=&emci=bb03cc8f-7786-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=a28eabd4-7f86-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Amanda Makki Receives 19th Major Endorsement- from the political arm of our nation’s Emergency Physicians!
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0f0e6d8ffb93/can-you-believe-this-1480001?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=82c855954e&e=bbeef49760)
---
| Thank you to all my supporters for helping us earn the endorsement and support of the National Emergency Medicine PAC (NEMPAC).
With the endorsements of Republican Leaders like Kevin McCarthy and Steve Scalise, and being one of only 27 NRCC Young Guns “Contenders” in the U.S., we are thrilled today to get the endorsement of the political arm of the American College of Emergency Physicians, representing 38,000 Emergency Physicians, emergency medicine residents and medical students in Florida and throughout the U.S who are on the frontlines helping to fight COVID-19.
This adds to our endorsements from the healthcare community, including Congressmen Dr. Michael Burgess, Ranking Member of the Healthcare Subcommittee on Energy and Commerce, as well as Dr. Neal Dunn, a Leader on the Veterans Affairs Committee from Florida.
As many of you know, I started my career in healthcare, working my way from being a file clerk to a medical biller and office manager. From there I went on to become an attorney with a focus on healthcare policy and spent nearly two decades advising on Republican healthcare principles. Healthcare will be a key focus of mine when I serve you in Congress.
Thank you again for your early support to help us get here. We will continue to build on our fundraising momentum and ask for your support to help us deliver another strong quarter!
---
|
---
| | | Sincerely,

Amanda Makki for Congress
Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District
727-735-5921

For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com
For Contributions via Mail, please send to:
Amanda Makki for Congress
PO Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Thank you to all my supporters for helping us earn the endorsement and support of the National Emergency Medicine PAC (NEMPAC). With the endorsements of Republican Leaders like Kevin McCarthy and Steve Scalise, and being one of only 27 NRCC Young Guns “Contenders” in the U.S., we are thrilled today to get the endorsement of the political arm of the American College of Emergency Physicians, representing 38,000 Emergency Physicians, emergency medicine residents and medical students in Florida and throughout the U.S who are on the frontlines helping to fight COVID-19. This adds to our endorsements from the healthcare community, including Congressmen Dr. Michael Burgess, Ranking Member of the Healthcare Subcommittee on Energy and Commerce, as well as Dr. Neal Dunn, a Leader on the Veterans Affairs Committee from Florida. As many of you know, I started my career in healthcare, working my way from being a file clerk to a medical biller and office manager. From there I went on to become an attorney with a focus on healthcare policy and spent nearly two decades advising on Republican healthcare principles. Healthcare will be a key focus of mine when I serve you in Congress. Thank you again for your early support to help us get here. We will continue to build on our fundraising momentum and ask for your support to help us deliver another strong quarter! | | | | Sincerely, Amanda Makki for Congress Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th District 727-735-5921 For Online Contributions: www.amandamakki.com For Contributions via Mail, please send to: Amanda Makki for Congress PO Box 47483 St. Petersburg, FL 33743 | "Contribute Today" | | | | Copyright © 2020 Amanda Makki for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Incredible progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
President Donald Trump took to the national stage on Wednesday to highlight the great work Hoosiers have accomplished together so far in our work...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469189?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Incredible Progress

President Donald Trump took to the national stage on Wednesday to highlight the great work Hoosiers have accomplished together so far in our work to combat the coronavirus. When talking about Indiana, he said, "It's incredible what they're doing."

When I heard him say that, I knew those kind words were truly a credit to Hoosier Republicans like you. That's because so many of you are going above and beyond in your communities to help our friends, family, and neighbors through this pandemic. Governor Eric Holcomb highlights these stories almost daily in his press conferences.

Here's two incredible stories of progress from Governor Holcomb this week:
* We’re seeing an increase in COVID-19 testing in Indiana per capita, with 999 tests per 100,000 Hoosiers, putting Indiana on pace with our Midwestern neighbors.
* That’s while business associations this week provided their feedback on changes they can make to promote sanitation and social distancing during a phased reopening of our state’s economy.

And we're also seeing more incredible progress as we move closer to Indiana's June 2 primary. Our local election officials and candidates are hard at work – both with election administration and campaigning. We've got a new Indiana Republican Election Resource page (https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) live with information on new election dates and updates, and I encourage you to check it out.

President Trump is right. Indiana is making incredible progress! We’re in this together. And together, I know we can keep it going as we begin to see light at the end of this tunnel.

#INThisTogether,
- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/682794382474495/?__xts__[0]=68.ARB6QsbSZtFjQN6cMGGV4OmL2v_tIa7719fq2GtVXkWyWVlj5LlIcdv6ibmKEMwRzNeoz0qyk8qFVmpXz1E8rvaGaqdAjNQ4Iaruv89ooVpeRG5sICyp_hym-2sFggnf0sSsFSdZM506jNdhYRnAiprIQzpcIOhdEa0X-JedxrI5g0Nh9BZk2WemAa751CpB4mA91_1K6J_jSY2UCn4VDkhURtGPpUmiBBtiUhu5Xa-ZizIRbsofT-IHfpv1olV96ZDCgiiH4kGVCmFkO8Tcef-pwZ6DgmTPj2kLRyg-LI6RdE7WHraQ47qNLlhj0XPhOplLpLevK5FE84tOwbF3aZuLiXB_dlw_s1mXTg&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Indiana: On the Road to Reopening

Governor Holcomb continues to take action to lead our state during this challenging time.

Even though we are still hunkered down until May 1st, Governor Holcomb and our state officials have taken steps to begin reopening our economy, with Indiana taking some of the early steps this week! Hospitals throughout the state started conducting more non-COVID-19 related procedures, and next week, they’ll be cleared to start conducting more elective procedures.

Governor Holcomb also announced a new partnership between the Indiana State Department of Health and the Fairbanks School of Public Health to measure the spread of COVID-19 throughout the state. Indiana is one of the first states to conduct a study like this, which gives us a head-start as we continue to make data-driven decisions in our response to this pandemic. For more information, watch the video of this announcement here (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/682794382474495/?__xts__[0]=68.ARB6QsbSZtFjQN6cMGGV4OmL2v_tIa7719fq2GtVXkWyWVlj5LlIcdv6ibmKEMwRzNeoz0qyk8qFVmpXz1E8rvaGaqdAjNQ4Iaruv89ooVpeRG5sICyp_hym-2sFggnf0sSsFSdZM506jNdhYRnAiprIQzpcIOhdEa0X-JedxrI5g0Nh9BZk2WemAa751CpB4mA91_1K6J_jSY2UCn4VDkhURtGPpUmiBBtiUhu5Xa-ZizIRbsofT-IHfpv1olV96ZDCgiiH4kGVCmFkO8Tcef-pwZ6DgmTPj2kLRyg-LI6RdE7WHraQ47qNLlhj0XPhOplLpLevK5FE84tOwbF3aZuLiXB_dlw_s1mXTg&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Meanwhile, new resources are coming online to help Hoosiers and communities –
* For Hoosiers who need help paying their rent or mortgage, check out this resource guide and help available through Indiana’s Hardest Hit Fund - https://877gethope.org?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID] (https://877gethope.org/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* Thirteen rural Indiana communities are receiving $1.96 million in federal funding to assist with their local COVID-19 response (with more communities to be announced soon.). Check out the list of Indiana communities here (https://calendar.in.gov/site/ocra/event/lt-gov-crouch-announces-13-covid-19-response-recipients/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* Governor Holcomb signed a new executive order to expedite the review of unemployment insurance claims. The order also waives paper requirements to help Hoosier businesses apply for federal assistance. Review the executive order here (https://www.in.gov/gov/files/Executive%20Order%2020-23%20Additional%20Directives%20Business%20%20Health.pdf?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether!

Primary Election Resources

You've probably heard that Indiana's 2020 primary election date has been moved to June 2. But are you aware of all the other important election dates between now and then?
Important deadlines approaching:
* May 4: Deadline to register to vote
* May 8: A candidate’s committee must file a pre-primary campaign finance report no later than noon
* May 21: Deadline to request an absentee ballot

There’s also an option available for all Hoosiers to vote either absentee by-mail, early, or on Primary Day. To learn more about these dates (and more!) and these voting options, we have a new Indiana Republican Election Resource Page available:

--> Click here to view the Indiana Republican Election Resource Page <-- (https://action.indiana.gop/get-election-updates-040120/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congress Passes Additional COVID-19 Relief

This week, Congress and President Donald Trump took action to provide additional needed coronavirus relief. This relief package includes renewed funding for the Paycheck Protection Program, Economic Injury Disaster Loans, hospitals, and expanded testing.

The relief package includes:
* $310 billion for the Paycheck Protection Program.
* $50 billion for Economic Injury Disaster Loans.
* $10 billion for Economic Injury Disaster Loan advance grants.
* $75 billion for hospitals.
* $25 billion for testing.
* Clarification allowing farmers with under 500 employees to seek Economic Injury Disaster Loans.

For more information, check out detail about this new funding from Senator Todd Young here (https://www.young.senate.gov/newsroom/press-releases/young-statement-on-additional-coronavirus-relief-funding?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

News You Can Use

Governor Eric Holcomb announces study to better understand COVID-19 impact (https://fox59.com/news/coronavirus/gov-holcomb-to-provide-covid-19-update-as-state-continues-to-craft-reopening-plan/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch discusses the pandemic (https://www.tristatehomepage.com/news/local-news/lt-governor-suzanne-crouch-joins-eyewitness-news-to-discuss-pandemic/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) in Southern Indiana (https://www.tristatehomepage.com/news/local-news/lt-governor-suzanne-crouch-joins-eyewitness-news-to-discuss-pandemic/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Todd Young speaks to Hoosiers about latest relief package (https://www.wndu.com/content/news/Sen-Todd-Young-speaks-to-Hoosiers-about-latest-relief-package-569907201.html?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Senator Mike Braun discusses $480 billion package to help small businesses and hospitals (https://www.wndu.com/content/news/Indiana-Sen-Mike-Braun-on-480-billion-package-to-help-small-businesses-hospitals-569868921.html?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Jackie Walorski introduced Medical Supplies for Pandemics Act of 2020 (https://www.wimsradio.com/2020/04/20/u-s-reps-jackie-walorski-r-ind-and-debbie-dingell-d-mich-recently-introduced-the-medical-supplies-for-pandemics-act-of-2020-which-would-strengthen-the-strategic-national-stockpile/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Banks listens to first responders' concerns about COVID-19 (https://www.kpcnews.com/covid-19/article_1152a711-dcb9-5dee-8dc8-dc43228e2f01.html?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Jim Baird says we can overcome this (https://www.jconline.com/story/opinion/contributors/2020/04/22/congressman-jim-baird-we-can-overcome-coronavirus-covid-19/2998417001/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congresswoman Susan Brooks proposes solution to stocking nation's PPE stockpile (https://riponadvance.com/stories/brooks-proposes-bipartisan-solution-to-stocking-nations-stockpile-of-medical-supplies/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Greg Pence will be in D.C. to vote and serve Hoosiers (https://wrbiradio.com/2020/04/23/greg-pence-opposes-voting-by-proxy-will-be-in-d-c-to-vote/?mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Larry Bucshon discusses avoiding coronavirus scams (https://www.facebook.com/RepLarryBucshon/photos/a.140575839335775/2996197047106959/?type=3&theater&mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Congressman Trey Hollingsworth offers COVID-19 resources for veterans (https://www.facebook.com/RepTrey/posts/928126024327459?__xts__[0]=68.ARAT8pKKBRaFfzgN524lu-sFydbunfxECvvSGVRXCawpYaJiZHX-jONqiR7rg9oFexh1hJaO6Ml8KrM9pqSvVJgKUov8Ua1NfPHvibR5oV664tMWZ0SW2CYJ24I6jKn61hus3CF8e7ARtdCRO_2VczD8BsoJqB2o6EL_HgjtkUijBJ4HBWxDCbHZYnjgQHWJaUZSdI9rJ9rMMWDe5Vo5bxr0ElxTp0JAgazQKXWotEUFonEvSoAkb2e8Ze6PRccEcMqPnhZM92K8jM3Q5GETrItGX1_j-S8lhwESpxuqipwh9YRpcr_m9GZtOemzdFgFDsHd8gDCVhc6AsT_9Hg&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=24c7cadd44&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Team Warner
subject: Mark, Bernie, Doug, and Richard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We know that folks are focused on Mark Warner's lack of cooking skills right now, but he's cooking up something bigger (and more palatable) with Senators Bernie Sanders, Doug Jones, and Richard Blumen
|
---
| | Derek --

We know that folks are focused on Mark Warner's lack of cooking skills right now, but he's cooking up something bigger (and more palatable) with Senators Bernie Sanders, Doug Jones, and Richard Blumenthal. They just released a new plan that would protect the paycheck and health care benefits of every rank-and-file worker in America.

Their proposal, the Paycheck Security Act, would cover the payroll expenses for workers making up to $90,000 per year at any company whose business has been severely impacted by this pandemic. This would not only secure the paychecks and health care benefits for millions of American workers, it would help stabilize the economy and prevent future layoffs. We're facing a crisis, and this legislation is one way that Mark is working hard to get tangible benefits into the hands of some of the people who need them most.

With unemployment at the highest levels since the Great Depression, families across the Commonwealth and the country are struggling right now. Mark Warner understands we need bold solutions to prevent this public health crisis from turning into an economic recession.

**[Sign on to be a citizen co-sponsor of The Paycheck Security Act and show your support for this important proposal to protect American workers.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fc/53d9897e/54c0dbbf/1c8869cd/230708455/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-paycheck2")**

Bottom line: This legislation would keep paychecks coming to the folks who need them and prevent more Americans from losing their employer-sponsored health insurance in the middle of a pandemic.

And yes, this bill could protect the food runners, servers, and chefs at some of our favorite restaurants. **Mark knows that some meal preparation is best left to the professionals** -- and he's going to do his level best to make sure that those folks, and all of America's workers, get the pay security they deserve during this pandemic.

He's not letting this moment of levity distract him from his mission -- he's still fighting to make sure that every Virginian is supported and protected through this outbreak.

**[Will you show your support for The Paycheck Security Act?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fc/53d9897e/54c0dbbf/1c8869cd/230708455/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-paycheck2")**

Thank you for your support,

Team Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fc/53d9897e/54c0dbbf/1c8869cc/230708455/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200424b_p_1_fl__553__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4fc/53d9897e/54c0dbbf/1c8869cb/230708455/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: The Franken Crew
subject: We're live!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
This is a battleship-moment for our campaign. We called out the big guns to sound off what makes this campaign unique nationwide--we have the candidate, ready-made, to lead in the US Senate on day 1.
|
---
| |
---

| | **Hello to the Admiral 's Crew -- our first major TV ad is live across Iowa! ** This is a battleship-moment for our campaign. We called out the big guns to sound off what makes this campaign unique nationwide -- we have the candidate, ready-made, to lead in the US Senate on day 1. Early voting started yesterday, it is an 'All Hands On Deck' moment to make the case why Admiral Mike is THE CANDIDATE to defeat Joni Ernst. [_**If you haven 't yet seen the ad, click below.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a6/33365068/4a75aaf1/3f8bf42d/324237482/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200423_ad5_em_fr_all_l1") [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a6/33365068/4a75aaf1/3f8bf42e/324237482/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200423_ad5_em_fr_all_img") We must keep the momentum going. We are in the first week of a six-week ad buy; 'All Engines Ahead, Full." We need complete saturation to ensure Iowans know that we finally have a chance to send a leader to the US Senate, a leader from Day 1, and a steely-eyed Democrat from the most Republican quadrant in Iowa. It is time to change the future by defeating those who didn't lead in the past -- from city to town to rural Iowa. Can you help round out our Ad Fund? We're looking to raise an additional $10,000 by midnight tonight. That buys three days of must-see TV in Iowa. [_**Click here and chip in if you can, any amount goes a long way. Boom!**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a6/33365068/4a75aaf1/3f8bf42f/324237482/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200423_ad5_em_fr_all_l2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24a6/33365068/4a75aaf1/3f8bf428/324237482/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200423_ad5_em_fr_all_abx5")

We've all been watching Katie Porter fight boldly for the American people -- and it turns out Sen. Warren has been watching right alongside us!
When Katie confronted Trump's CDC official, she did her homework and didn't back down -- **and entirely thanks to her, the CDC has promised free coronavirus testing for everyone.**
And who could forget Katie's latest viral moment??
[](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_portersplit_apr?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200424_WarrenEndorsement_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200424_PorterWarren_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200424_PorterWarren_U1_X1")
**But Peter, it isn 't all good news.**
The GOP is _already_ **SMEARING** Elizabeth Warren's endorsement!!
They're fear-mongering about a "socialist agenda" and LYING about these women's accomplishments.
**[We can't stand for this. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A few hours ago, President Trump signed more relief into law
body:
America’s small businesses should never have been left waiting by House Democrats.

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55edc9543a&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • April 24, 2020

** NEW: President Trump signs emergency relief bill
------------------------------------------------------------
America’s small businesses should never have been left waiting by House Democrats—but with President Trump’s signature today, more relief is on the way.

🎬 President Trump: We’re keeping millions of Americans on the payroll (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d26503f32e&e=3ee4985eea)

The new law, signed just hours ago, will replenish the President’s small business loans program while also providing crucial support for America’s frontline medical workers. Specifically, the new agreement provides:
* $320 billion in additional funding for the Paycheck Protection Program

* $75 billion for hospitals and healthcare providers to fight Coronavirus

* $25 billion for ongoing testing across the country

The Paycheck Protection Program ensures that small businesses can continue to pay employees and cover costs during this global health crisis. After the program launched earlier this month, it proved so crucial a lifeline that its initial funding ran out in just 14 days. With today’s signing, millions of Americans will now stay on the payroll.

“I want to thank Congress for answering my call to pass this critical funding,” President Trump said.

🇺🇸 A historic victory for Americans! (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98dfbf6d22&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 Bret Baier corrects the record: Nancy Pelosi halted the funding. Period. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1a001f2aa&e=3ee4985eea)

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
President Trump signs H.R. 266, the Paycheck Protection Program and Health Care Enhancement Act | April 24, 2020

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8bf7e98e05&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b843d7aa4c&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f2d2c401c3)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Absurd, ridiculous, ludicrous...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
In case you haven't seen Mitch McConnell's comments...
| **From the Desk of
Jay Inslee** Friend, Absurd, ridiculous, ludicrous -- _McConnell-ish._ I was shocked, along with my fellow Republican and Democratic governors, when Mitch McConnell said we should let the states go bankrupt -- justifying his stance that Congress shouldn't assist states in their response to the coronavirus pandemic. You might call it ridiculous to say that. Some might call it ludicrous. Or you might call it McConnell-ish. It was a very McConnell-ish thing to say, to let states go bankrupt. This isn't about red or blue. It's about supporting the small businesses and the front-line workers who are the backbone of our country. **We should all be putting people over politics right now -- but Mitch McConnell's comments show congressional Republicans only want politics as usual.[If you believe like I do that there's no such thing as red states or blue states in a pandemic, add your name next to mine to condemn Mitch McConnell's comments right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/bluestates-bailouts/?utm_source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&utm_campaign=bsb&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=8053%2E868730%2EBE86o6)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/bluestates-bailouts/?utm_source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&utm_campaign=bsb&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=8053%2E868730%2EBE86o6)
---
Leadership in D.C. has said they are the backup, and states should lead. Well, Washington has -- and it's time for the federal government to support the states.
We have states, both Republican and Democratic, who are doing the best they can to make sure people have food and public safety and health care.
I hope Congress will come to its senses and Senate Majority Leader McConnell will do the right thing because states going bankrupt would devastate local communities and cut important services we all depend on. Destroying our public safety, public health, transportation, education, and other systems would only bring additional pain to everyone during this difficult time.
[**That's why Senate Majority Leader McConnell's comments are so dangerous and so ludicrous -- if you agree, join our call to condemn his comments today.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/bluestates-bailouts/?utm_source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&utm_campaign=bsb&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=8053%2E868730%2EBE86o6)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/bluestates-bailouts/?utm_source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&source=ema_2020-04-24_bsb&utm_campaign=bsb&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=8053%2E868730%2EBE86o6)
---

PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111

body:

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=bf4fc89271-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-bf4fc89271-25822489

Hello

I know I've already asked but are YOU ready to WIN?

We’ve got 39 days left until Election Day but absentee votes are coming in NOW! We're building LOTS of support heading into the final stretch, but we’re counting on your help to keep this momentum going.

We know life has you busy, especially now, but just 30 minutes of your day will make all the difference.

** 📞 CALLS 📞
------------------------------------------------------------
We’re making hundreds of voter contacts a day and getting great results. But we’ll need to engage every #TeamBret (https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/teambret?source=note&epa=HASHTAG&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=bf4fc89271-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-bf4fc89271-25822489) volunteer to win this race.

DO YOU HAVE TIME TO MAKE 10 CALLS TO GUARANTEED VOTERS IN YOUR COUNTY?

Help spread the word and show how grassroots hustle beats big money politics every time.
GET INVOLVED! (mailto:barbin@richardsforcongress.com?subject=Let's%20spread%20the%20word&body=Hey%20Brett%2C%20%0A%0ACould%20you%20set%20me%20up%20to%20make%20calls%20for%20the%20Bret%20Richards%20campaign%3F%20%0A%0AThanks!)

** 🚧 SIGNS 🚧
------------------------------------------------------------
We’ve set up hundreds of signs across our district to show our support in all 39 counties. The reception has been incredible, but we still have 32 barn signs and 179 yard signs to hand out.

DO YOU HAVE SPACE IN YOUR YARD OR KNOW A GREAT SPOT FOR A 4’x8’ SIGN?

Let’s get a sign in every town across our district.
I WANT A BARN/YARD SIGN (http://richardsforcongress.com/volunteer?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=bf4fc89271-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-bf4fc89271-25822489)
I'm so humbled by your continued support and I know how much Bret appreciates everything you've done. We'll win this thing working together one vote at a time.

Let’s do this.

Brett Barbin
Campaign Manager

P.S. If you haven't requested your absentee ballot yet, be sure to!
Click here (https://sos.iowa.gov/elections/electioninfo/absenteeinfo.html?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=bf4fc89271-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_202012_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-bf4fc89271-25822489) to make sure your vote is counted this election.

clean_body: We’ve got 39 days left until Election Day but absentee votes are coming in NOW! We're counting on your support to keep our grassroots momentum going. Hello I know I've already asked but are YOU ready to WIN? We’ve got 39 days left until Election Day but absentee votes are coming in NOW! We're building LOTS of support heading into the final stretch, but we’re counting on your help to keep this momentum going. We know life has you busy, especially now, but just 30 minutes of your day will make all the difference. 📞 CALLS 📞 We’re making hundreds of voter contacts a day and getting great results. But we’ll need to engage every #TeamBret () volunteer to win this race. DO YOU HAVE TIME TO MAKE 10 CALLS TO GUARANTEED VOTERS IN YOUR COUNTY? Help spread the word and show how grassroots hustle beats big money politics every time. GET INVOLVED! (mailto:barbin@richardsforcongress.com?subject=Let's%20spread%20the%20word&body=Hey%20Brett%2C%20%0A%0ACould%20you%20set%20me%20up%20to%20make%20calls%20for%20the%20Bret%20Richards%20campaign%3F%20%0A%0AThanks!) 🚧 SIGNS 🚧 We’ve set up hundreds of signs across our district to show our support in all 39 counties. The reception has been incredible, but we still have 32 barn signs and 179 yard signs to hand out. DO YOU HAVE SPACE IN YOUR YARD OR KNOW A GREAT SPOT FOR A 4’x8’ SIGN? Let’s get a sign in every town across our district. I WANT A BARN/YARD SIGN () I'm so humbled by your continued support and I know how much Bret appreciates everything you've done. We'll win this thing working together one vote at a time. Let’s do this. Brett Barbin Campaign Manager P.S. If you haven't requested your absentee ballot yet, be sure to! name: Holcomb Crew
subject: PPE = the next critical step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
some late-breaking news after Governor Holcomb’s press conference today | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

Indiana’s known for a lot of things – and as you know, it’s not just basketball. We’re a state with deep manufacturing roots, and a Hoosier hospitality that’s unrivaled anywhere in the world.

And we’re excited to share with you some late-breaking news after Governor Holcomb’s press conference today: Thanks to the generosity, ingenuity and hard work of our Hoosier manufacturers, _**we’ve seen commitments for PPE production double in just two weeks!**_

**_This increased supply of PPE is another critical step Indiana must take as we work toward reopening our economy...and today’s good news means that we’re well on our way._**

The state has received commitments for 6.3 million pieces of PPE, including face masks, face shields, gloves, gowns, goggles and bottles of hand sanitizer. Almost half of that is being produced right here in Indiana!

_**And all of it is going straight to our healthcare heroes – hospitals, first responders, long-term care facilities and more.**_

More than 1.178 million pieces of this PPE have already been distributed to our frontline workers, with another 150,000 to 300,000 items expected to be received this week!

Governor Holcomb said it today:

_**"Your PPE, and my PPE, is the nurses, and the nurse aids, and the pharmacists, and the doctors, and the radiology assistants, the first responders. That's my PPE. And they need their PPE, so that we can continue down this path of progress."**_

Have a great weekend, and remember – we’re getting through this...together!

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. An update from our email on Monday – today, Governor Holcomb officially signed the executive order allowing elective procedures to resume at 11:59 p.m. on Sunday, as long as the provider has adapted policies and they have sufficient PPE. [**Check it out here!**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=9e91ca24e9df4df29e676fa600e88bb9&_e=c54SuznI88JVt6Q8m6n845SiShl6bl2ylXE9zjSSBP2ybRad91pEox7InPufA6A_AnZc1PgT73tgS7csJklUP3-8J7qvVtbw-igzYqQ5UfcQY93OnU4Ny15pvuYdBzae1UXjdMa5G-d7V48BgKUFFprwbqqxb6v2ipwx7-gLEdWEuhfbUxptXOLhmBZmN9WYTU5K5p2rxhCuKC-WjqxCqtV_MeqxVJGO4KUlAGwQyAoqVX7hm_TTxW7N5mFAA7g_v7EAyFYf7gCd2yQLw760qtBI2KPQe3EnSbByxDQOcuMtOup1Oq5lB1rBexWVZ_T6nuxIxDJogGUqMePRUEksg3zuAMq6R_wOZ0TJ-Q-JFwYANkBp8lUE3JbihEpsmKuu8lhk8_d4jAsgKSIZvvwkI2SrDbXx9ieCSalACMXFvyA%3D)
---
---

|
| |
---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Poll - Allow China to be Sued?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I have introduced a bill to allow Americans to sue the Chinese Communist Party for its role in covering up and spreading the virus across the world. China should be held accountable, and letting American lawyers seize China’s assets around the world will be a good start to getting justice for the thousands of victims of the China virus.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42352091&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjYxMzEyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

We both know that China caused this pandemic. And we both know that they need to pay.

Here’s how we’re going to do it:

I introduced legislation to allow Americans to sue the Chinese Communist Party for its role in covering up and spreading the virus across the world.

China should be held accountable, and letting American lawyers seize China’s assets around the world will be a good start to getting justice for the thousands of victims of the China virus. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDIzNTIwOTES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjYxMzEyMgS2&mt=1&rt=0 What I want to know is if you think this is a good idea.

Do you agree that Americans should be able to sue China over China’s role in covering up and spreading the China virus?
Quick China Poll

The liberal media ignored my warnings and instead attacked me for speaking the truth.

I will continue to speak out against the Chinese Communist party and hope you will join me in the fight to hold them accountable.
